  6. Enhanced Sound UI: Polished the sound settings with a high-density layout featuring:
    • Clear (X) Button: Quickly revert to bundled sounds and reset selections.
    • Manual Browse: Replicated the "Shared Storage" pattern with a custom folder browser for better control.
    • Info Tooltip: Added an interactive info icon explaining the .wav file format requirement.
  7. Dynamic Storage Selection: Enhanced the Preset Creation dialog to dynamically filter storage tiers. Tiers like 'Local' or 'Shared' now only appear if their respective paths have been configured in preferences.
  8. Preset Relocation: Added a new 'Relocate Preset' operator allowing users to move existing presets between tiers (e.g., from Local to Shared or Project).
  9. Display Name Editing: Introduced the ability to edit the display name of any preset independently of its filename.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Unified Storage Tiers for Preferences: Overhauled the Addon Preferences save system to follow the same four-tier model as Render Presets: Default (Blender internal), Local, Shared, and Project.
  2. Consolidated Path Management: Preferences now automatically utilize the same directory paths configured for Render Presets, eliminating redundant path fields and ensuring project settings are always stored alongside their respective assets.
  3. Project Mode Auto-Discovery: Refined the 'Project' preferences mode to automatically discover and load user_preferences.json from the project's presets folder, removing the need for legacy "burned-in" file paths.
  4. UI State Serialization Isolation: Decoupled transient UI states (active tabs, expansion states) from the persistent configuration file to prevent UI "jumps" or "freeze loops" when switching between different profiles.
  5. Dynamic Project Folder Creation: The addon now automatically offers to create the standard presets/ folder structure when a new project configuration is initialized.
  6. Preferences UI Simplification: Flattened the 'Data' tab in Addon Preferences, removing obsolete sub-tabs and presenting storage tier paths and preference save modes in a single, high-density overview.
  7. Storage Tier Persistence: Implemented a global seeding system that synchronizes the default preset storage tier across all scenes upon file loading and preference restoration.
  8. Internal Storage Refinement: Completed the migration of storage tier internal identifiers (USER -> LOCAL, CUSTOM -> SHARED) across all operators and serialization routines.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Addon Preferences UI Freeze: Resolved a critical issue where the preferences panel became non-interactive after loading a configuration.
  2. Infinite Update Loop Prevention: Implemented a robust reentrance guard (prefs_loading_guard) that suppresses recursive _autosave_preferences and cascading load cycles during configuration application.
  3. Dynamic Enum Validation: Added strict validation of saved identifiers for dynamic EnumProperties (Sound Files, Config Files). Invalid or missing entries are now gracefully skipped instead of corrupting the UI state or locking up the panel.
  4. Unified Configuration Loading: Consolidated all preferences loading paths (Startup, Project-load, and Manual) into a single, guarded execution pipeline.
  5. Startup Performance: Eliminated redundant triple-loading of configuration files during Blender startup by standardizing the registration-time and deferred-load handlers.
  6. UI State Displacement: Resolved an issue where loading a configuration file could force the Addon Preferences tab to an incorrect sub-section.
  7. Configuration Corruption Guard: Hardened the JSON parser with additional schema validation to prevent malformed preference files from causing registration-time errors.
  8. Legacy Burned-In Path Cleanup: Implemented automated cleanup of old tks_custom_prefs_path metadata from .blend files to ensure a clean transition to the new tier-based storage model.
  9. Blender 5.1 Registration Crash: Patched a critical AttributeError caused by NoneType preferences during the initial registration of sound folder properties.
  10. Sound Play Button Logic: Resolved issues where the sound preview button would fail to fire or fail to gray out correctly when no valid custom file was selected.
  11. Shared Folder Logic: Hardened the Shared folder lock mechanism to strictly enforce read-only status when the safety toggle is active.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Shared Render Presets: Introduced a centralized 'Shared' render preset tier designed for studio and team environments. Users can point this tier to a network drive to share presets globally across multiple projects.
  2. Shared Folder Protection: Added a new presets_shared_lock toggle in Addon Preferences to strictly protect the Shared presets folder. When locked, saving or modifying presets in the Shared tier is disabled to prevent accidental overrides.
  3. Preset Template Seeding: Built-in preset templates are now automatically seeded from the addon into the user's Local storage upon initialization, providing immediate starting points that can be safely modified without affecting the originals.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Storage Tier Architecture: Overhauled the render preset serialization engine. Renamed legacy USER and CUSTOM tiers to the more intuitive LOCAL and SHARED tiers to better reflect their intended usage.
  2. Data Path Management: Redesigned the Addon Preferences 'Data' tab to provide clearer visibility and management of the new Local and Shared preset directory paths.
  3. Preset Storage Compliance: Redirected the ADDON storage tier from the installation folder to Blender's native user preset directory (scripts/presets/takes_for_blender/presets/). Bundled preset templates are now seeded into the native folder on first registration. The preferences label was updated from "Addon Folder" to "Default" to reflect this native compliance.

docs.title: Added
docs.text: 1. Auto-Clean Empty Slots: The Inspector now automatically removes empty slots (slots with zero keyframes) to keep the action list tidy and prevent ghost data accumulation.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. UI Simplification: Simplified the top header by removing the deprecated 'Reference Lock' toggle to reduce visual clutter.
  2. Addon Preferences: Cleaned up the preferences UI by fixing the F12 render setting alignment and removing the obsolete 'Protected Mode' configuration option.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Live Slot List Sync: Fixed an issue where the Inspector's slot list would fail to refresh and update immediately when keyframes were manually deleted in the timeline.
  2. Action Search Targeting: Resolved a bug where the 'Find Action' operator would fail to locate actions assigned to Node Trees and deeply nested targets.
  3. Strict Toggle Polling: Enforced stricter toggle logic for refresh buttons, preventing redundant redraw dispatches when UI state hasn't meaningfully changed.

docs.title: Added
docs.text: 1. Channel Modifiers Panel: Decoupled modifier properties into their own dedicated TKS_PT_ChannelModifiers sub-panel inside the Inspector channels view, improving visual organization and layout density.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text: 1. Pointer-Identity Slot Renaming: Upgraded the core slot renaming engine to utilize exact pointer-identity mappings, further resolving edge-case name collision issues during bulk renaming or complex hierarchy migrations.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text: 1. JIT Slot Template Drift: Fixed an issue where Just-In-Time (JIT) Rest Action merges and keyframe writes would fall back to generating raw object-named slots (e.g., Cube) instead of strictly adhering to configured templates (e.g., Cube_MESH). This effectively eliminates slot mismatch drift during auto-assimilation.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Fast Switch Optimizations: Simplified the internal vl_switch_fast engine by removing legacy fallback mapping for renamed objects, streamlining the view layer iteration pipeline.
  2. Project Roadmap & Health Metrics: Updated internal ROADMAP.md to formally reflect the completion of major architectural milestones (Phase 4.5 Core Deconstruction, Phase 12 Naming Guards, Phase 13 Batch Enhancements, and Phase 14 UI Overhaul). Regenerated codebase_stats_human.md metrics tracking the latest broad-exception sweeps.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Multiselect Settings Pasting: Enhanced the Paste View Layer Settings operator to fully support multiselect operations. Users can now apply clipboard collection visibility states to multiple target View Layers simultaneously from the Inspector Global overview.
  2. Compact Action Mode: Added a Compact Action Mode toggle in the slot settings that hides action name text strings, rendering only the action icon to save space. Full details remain accessible via hover tooltips.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text: 1. Inspector Slot Layout: Refined the Inspector slot list UI, optimizing element spacing via fixed-width ui_units_x to eliminate gaps. Relocated the 'Find Action Slot' button from the slots sidebar into the watchlist sidebar for better discoverability.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Portable Preferences: Burned custom preferences paths directly into the .blend file data to guarantee complete project portability across different machines and OS environments.
  2. Template Naming Guards: Locked template naming string configurations behind a strict user-facing toggle to prevent accidental path and string destruction.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Rest State Architecture optimizations: De-coupled the Auto-Mirror toggle from the ephemeral WindowManager, migrating it natively into the core Addon Preferences. Re-engineered rest_cache logic to scope selection monitoring strictly within timers, actively avoiding polling during mid-transform operations.
  2. Slot Naming Standardization: Refactored the core slot pathing logic (_derive_slot_name_for_target) to strictly map to the global generate_slot_name template schema. This guarantees that Rest Action slots perfectly mirror user-defined naming strings.
  3. UI Inspector Consolidation: De-duplicated massive sections of UI operator definitions (deleting over 500 lines of legacy wrappers). Centralized contextual slot operators and popovers into the globally accessible ops_menus namespace.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Mid-Transform Snapping: Prevented objects from violently snapping back to their rest-state mid-drag. The revert queue is now correctly suspended while live autokeying is actively occurring on the viewport.
  2. NDOF Viewport Crashes: Resolved a severe EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION crash triggered by 3D mouse (NDOF) navigation polling during View Layer switches. UI redraw emissions are now safely deferred until the switch strictly completes.
  3. Auto-Slot Renaming Stability: Stabilized dynamic slot renaming by implementing a strict name-cache diff mapping strategy, effectively eliminating cascading name collision errors.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Rest Action Immutability: Disabled destructive keyframe cleanup during orphan redirects. The baseline Rest Action fcurves are now strictly preserved and copied instead of deleted to protect the global rest-state snapshot.
  2. Pinned Object Keyframing: Fixed an issue where autokeying pinned objects in a Cascade view layer would improperly trigger an Orphan Redirect. Pinned objects and their sub-targets are now correctly allowed to write directly to the Rest Action.

docs.title: Added
docs.text: 1. Centralized Tooltips: Added centralized tooltip modules to decouple localized text logic from UI layouts. Removed older extraction scripts to standardize the tooltip delivery pipeline.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Batch Render Cancellation Lockout: Fixed a critical bug where canceling a batch render caused a permanent _batch_render_in_progress lockout state. Cancelled renders are now properly flagged as FAILED instead of DONE, and the active C++ render thread is safely terminated instead of being permanently orphaned in the background.
  2. Batch Render Stale Pointers: Resolved settle observer class-level attribute caching and stale pointer access crashes during render sequence evaluation.
  3. Tooltip Syntax Errors: Resolved syntax errors caused by the tooltip refactoring rollout affecting text displays in active popovers.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Cascade Validation Alerts: Implemented a comprehensive visual alert system for missing or broken cascade assignments (Action, Camera, Compositor, World, and Output Rules) across all UI tiers. Broken references are highlighted consistently with a red background alert signal, while maintaining icon clarity using emboss='NONE_OR_STATUS'.
  2. Navigation Pie Menu Customization: Added customizable slots for the navigation pie menu.
  3. Troubleshooting Documentation: Added cascade drift migration documentation to the undo troubleshooting guide.
  4. Preferences Reset Operators: Added new operator functionality within addon preferences to easily reset hotkey bindings and pie menu slots back to their factory default states.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Core Override Properties Migration: Converted core override properties (tks_action, tks_camera, tks_world, tks_compositor) from PointerProperty references to robust string-based lookups to prevent EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION crashes during Blender undo/redo cycles.
  2. Preset Icon Styling: Standardized on using "emboss=False" operators for overridden presets to maintain visual distinction between inherited (dimmed) and local (bright) states.
  3. Codebase Auditing & Stats: Updated the internal stats engine, removed AI fingerprints from generated documentation, and added missing docstrings to _DummyNode and TKS_VSW_TreeItem.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Undo/Redo Stability & Crash Prevention: Addressed multiple critical EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION crashes related to the undo/redo stack. Migrated the cascade drift tracker from live datablock references to string names. Added robust is_applying state guards via try/finally wrappers for the undo cascade path. Scoped action clearing to scene.objects rather than globally, and stabilized the mutation queue during global undo operations.
  2. Instant UI Cache Invalidation: Updated _handle_context_selection_sync to explicitly listen for depsgraph updates on Action, World, NodeTree, and non-transform Object modifications. The tree UI now instantly recalculates and displays red alert colors for broken assignments when references are deleted or renamed.
  3. Camera Shift+Click Selection: Fixed an issue where Shift+Clicking the View Layer camera icon in the tree silently failed and reported "No camera assigned". The cascade string value is now correctly resolved into an actual object before selection.
  4. Batch Render Camera Validation: Added pre-flight camera validation for batch renders, gracefully skipping View Layers without a resolved camera.
  5. Preset Override Invalidation: Fixed tree UI gear icon dimming by invalidating the VL cascade cache immediately upon setting a preset override.
  6. Exception Hardening: Eliminated broad except Exception: and except BaseException: catch-alls across core logic layers, batch rendering pipelines, and UI synchronizers to prevent silently masking critical stack traces.
  7. Process Monitor Exceptions: Marked headless UI evaluations and handler-restore appends as PM_EXEMPT to correctly bypass telemetry warnings during background execution.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Variant Switch Enhancements: Integrated Material Pool stat tracking into the Variant Tree product item view and added an Add Materials quick operative shortcut to the footer.
  2. Process Monitor Improvements: Unified the dead processes restart button—single click triggers a force restart while Alt+Click toggles the persistent auto-restart watchdog. Added Alt+Click cascading collapse toggles to feature groups.
  3. Troubleshooting Guides: Added comprehensive documentation for batch render import regressions and UI registration holes.
  4. Undo Safety Tests: Implemented unit tests (test_undo_safety.py) tracking property robustness on global undo chains.

docs.title: Changed (Major Architecture Modularization)
docs.text:
1. Variant Tree Polling: Enabled deep recursive search depth for collection polling on both Materials and Parts, ensuring deeply nested sub-children are correctly verified as valid targets.
  2. Batch Render Shared States: Replaced global state logic across isolated batch render engines with a decoupled shared.py config to ensure render paths, layers, and timers are correctly persisting through render hooks callbacks.
  3. Inspector Deconstruction: Deconstructed the colossal 1498-line panels/inspector/handlers.py into isolated modules: action_queue.py, cache.py, sync_actions.py, and sync_viewport.py to decouple viewport tracking from memory caching.
  4. Variant Switch Restructure: Deprecated the monolithic variant_tree.py (1413 lines), splitting its architecture into focused logic.py, operators.py, and ui.py components.
  5. Rest State Splitting: Split rest_state/operators.py (1170 lines) down into dedicated assimilation.py, keyframe_write.py, mirror_logic.py, and path_utils.py logic processors.
  6. Output Rules Decoupling: Separated ops_output_rules.py (1127 lines) into ops_output_popovers.py UI definitions and centralized rule_logic.py evaluation logic.
  7. Batch Pipeline Isolation: Re-architected batch render operators.py into distinct batch_pipeline.py, ops_background.py, and render_hooks.py engine modules.
  8. Variant Queries Isolation: Refactored variant toggle polling (vlg_has_variant, etc.) out of operators and into a central core.variant_queries routing model to prevent circular UI imports.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Inspector Path Mismatches: Corrected a dangling import path inside Inspector Sync where _resolve_id_type remained bound to legacy monolithic files instead of the new path_utils module.
  2. Rest Action Validation: The Rest Action icon in the context header now correctly flashes an alert state when its assigned action has been deleted or cannot be found.
  3. Batch Render Import Regressions: Fixed critical headless background failures and import bugs stemming from the aggressive modularization rollout.
  4. UI Missing Attributes: Resolved critical AttributeError tracebacks and registration holes throughout the split panels drawing engines.
  5. Inspector Sync State Restoration: Restored _syncing_objects_list, inspector_dirty, and slot_poll_dirty flags inside sync_viewport.py to prevent recursion loops during rapid selection.
  6. Non-Object Mirror Filtering: Fixed a severe bug where the _OBJECT_ONLY_PREFIXES constant was missing, raising a silent NameError that completely disabled the autokey mirror for all non-Object datablocks (ShaderNodeTree, Mesh, ShapeKeys, Scene, World, Material, etc.).
  7. Mirror Depsgraph Resolution: Fixed the mirror system evaluating read-only depsgraph ID copies instead of original datablocks, which previously led to incorrect slot naming (e.g. "Shader Nodetree" instead of target names) and failed keyframe insertions.
  8. Mirror Exception Safety: Enclosed _redirect_orphan_action in top-level try/except diagnostic blocks and added RuntimeError tracking for path_resolve and keyframe_insert to prevent silent mirror failures from killing the entire depsgraph evaluation loop.
  9. Expanded Datablock Registry: Added native support for Mesh, Key (Shape Keys), Curve, Lattice, and Armature types across _SUPPORTED_TYPES, _TYPE_MAP, the Quick Reject filter, and debounce timer resolution paths, bringing these datablocks into full compliance with the Rest State infrastructure.
  10. Fast-Path Action Gate: Fixed a logic trap where pressing I on sub-datablocks (like Mesh data properties) was entirely shielded from the mirror system because it was misclassified as a continuous object transform drag. The Fast-Path suppression now explicitly evaluates has_action_update to guarantee reliable non-object keyframing.
  11. Inspector UI Standardization: Standardized navigation pie menu ordering and fully synced icon branding for Slotted mode (LONGDISPLAY) and Watchlist (OBJECT_DATA) toggles across all panel headers and UI sub-menus.
  12. Action Assignment Consistency: Realigned the custom fallback operator for empty-state Action assignment so it visually mimics Blender's native slot dropdown structure via left alignment and a chevron indicator.
  13. Batch Render Sidebar: Improved layout logic in the Batch Render UI sidebar, properly separating and moving the global output settings toggle clearly above foreground/background execution operators.
  14. Camera Selector Filtering: Fixed a registration order bug where the tks_cam_filtered collection was registered after operator classes, causing all camera selectors to fall back to the unfiltered bpy.data.objects (showing meshes, lights, empties alongside cameras). Consolidated 10 duplicate inline filter blocks into a shared camera_prop_search helper.
  15. VL Grouping Duplicates: Fixed View Layers appearing twice in the Takes tree after grouping. The GroupVLs operator used string-only scene matching which silently skipped VLGs whose scene_name was empty (only the PointerProperty was set). Added per-scene VL dedup guards to both sync_all_viewlayers and ensure_default_groups with named-group-first priority.
  16. Refresh Tree Button: The Refresh Tree button now forces a full collection rebuild instead of hitting the in-place patch optimization, ensuring stale group data is always flushed.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Dual-Hierarchy Variant Tree UI: Implemented a new Parts and Materials dual-hierarchy structure within the Variant Tree to allow for independent management of visibility collections (Parts) and surface assignments (Materials).
  2. Unified Navigation Pie Menu: Added a new global navigation pie menu providing quick access to Context, Inspector, and Globals. Integrated a functional "Split View" button to safely invoke dual-list layouts on demand.
  3. List Height Globalization: Standardized reactive list heights and implemented explicit "Reset All" functionality. Synced override fields now provide visual dimming feedback to clearly display whether they are using default or manually customized states.
  4. Batch Render Pre-ETA & Overwrite Warning: Added a pre-render ETA estimate to the render queue header based on average sample times, and implemented an active overwrite warning popover with Alt+Click to bypass.
  5. Auto-Revert Skip Completed: The batch render engine now automatically reverts the "Skip Completed" toggle back to its default state if all queued rendering tasks are marked as DONE.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Variant Cascade Engine Refactoring: The variant cascade engine natively evaluates and applies independent visibility flags and material overrides according to the new structured Parts and Materials architecture.
  2. Variant Switch Debounce Dragging: Implemented a debounce timer for UI dragging operations inside the variant switch tree to improve performance and prevent rapid, excessive updates.
  3. Collection Exclude Decoupling: Decoupled the standard eye icon from the master collection exclude checkbox within the variant switch UI.
  4. Visibility Hierarchy Propagation: Refactored visibility logic to apply global visibility constraints correctly down to individual nested objects, instead of halting at collection boundaries.
  5. Cascade Recalculation Priority: The variant switch cascade engine now recalculates the entire tree upon any individual UI toggle, ensuring that override index priority remains perfectly intact.
  6. Codebase Automation Stats: Upgraded internal automated stats tracking, fixing UTF-8 false positives during documentation generation.
  7. Batch Cancel Button UI: Simplified cancellation workflows by removing the dual-step confirmation dialog. Canceling a batch render is now an immediate hard cancel with immediate UI feedback.
  8. Continue Button Memory: Consolidated batch render execution by removing redundant "Continue" buttons. The core render action automatically tracks and remembers the last selected render mode (Foreground/Background).

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Foreground Render Data Racing & Cancellation: Hardened the entire cancellation logic pipeline. Eliminated write-to-disk race conditions where C++ render threads outlived _cancelled flags. write_still=True is safely restored for reliable image context generation, and partial image outputs from interrupted frames are now definitively isolated and deleted post-abort.
  2. Render Window UX Hijacking: Fixed UI workspace tearing where the spawned pop-up rendering window persisted after render tasks completed. The window now cleanly auto-closes after the final frame or user cancellation.
  3. Outliner EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION: Prevented a fatal crash during batch abort when Blender attempted to refresh rendering outliner metrics against detached threads.
  4. Headless Cycle Initialization Fatal Crash: Fixed a fatal EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION executing Cycles UI-dependent property updates during headless initialization when no active viewport area is available.
  5. Compact Node Popover Resolution: Fixed a deep path resolution glitch in the Inspector Watchlist where embedded node trees (e.g., material or light nodes) failed to open their associated Action Assignment popover when their icons were clicked.
  6. Headless Visibility Lock (Process Environment): Fixed a severe background batch rendering bug where the headless worker forced the raytracer to output the global collection visibility state of the .blend file's default active View Layer across every rendered variant. The cli_worker.py script now completely overrides Blender's use_single_layer mechanic and manually restricts the use_for_render flags, guaranteeing the rendering engine inherits the precise collection visibilities mapped to the target Variant.
  7. Headless Position Evaluation Failure (RNA Flushing): Fixed an intermittent but catastrophic logic drop where FCurves and Action Keyframes failed to reposition objects during background renders. Background processing bypasses Blender's native UI event loop, causing newly assigned animation targets to silently queue without triggering a graph rebuild. The engine now aggressively invokes manual update_tag() flushes on all Objects, Materials, and internal NodeTrees before evaluating the dependency graph via manual frame_set timeline disruption, assuring 100% position accuracy.
  8. Batch Worker Ghost Directories: Fixed an issue where the background renderer erroneously created empty OS directories bearing the name of the temporary .tks_bg_render_tmp blend file. The os.makedirs path generation inside operators.py is now properly gated against bpy.app.background.
  9. Double Render Extension Prevention (UI & Engine): Resolved a systemic file naming glitch where [file_format] tokens resolved to uppercase internal Blender strings (e.g., PNG) instead of proper extensions, and combined with native Blender saving rules to produce double extensions (e.g. .PNG.png). The SmartSyntaxEngine now correctly projects lowercase file extensions, while path concatenation logic across operators.py, cli_worker.py, and the Smart Output UI (panel.py) now statically strip dummy extension assumptions and inspect existing suffixes before enforcing format extensions.
  10. Headless Variant Switch Action Leak: Fixed a severe headless render bug where materials correctly swapped via ViewLayer Variant Cascade rendered entirely un-animated. Background context (window_manager == None) forced an early exit during post-swap action assignment. Explicit scene and view_layer state are now cascaded directly down to _apply_pool to ensure proper linkage.
  11. Post-Swap Slot Binding (Blender 5.x): Fixed a critical animation evaluation gap where swapped materials received the correct cascade Action but had no action_slot bound. In Blender 5.x with layered actions, a missing slot means zero FCurves evaluate. The new _bind_action_and_slot helper now resolves and assigns both action and matching slot to each swapped material and node tree.
  12. Batch Render List Order: Completely eliminated the legacy preview_mode guard that was restricting the Headless background renderer from inheriting the UI tree's custom View Layer sort order. Background batch rendering now flawlessly sources its entire execution queue from the user's tks_all_viewlayers sorted order instead of falling back to the native Blender scene.view_layers sequence, guaranteeing perfect render execution parity between foreground and background modes.
  13. Headless Group Cascade Resolution Mismatch: Fixed a severe failure in the batch renderer where background variant switching completely skipped animation data assignment (materials rendered static). When an override is configured at the Group level (Scene or ViewLayer groups), Blender returns the cascade value as a StringProperty. The _apply_pool engine failed to anticipate this string and attempted to use it directly as a datablock, leading to a silent TypeError. The system now rigorously coerces string references to bpy.types.Action datablocks before proceeding with slot assignment logic.
  14. Headless NodeTree Slot Resolution: Fixed a persistent background render failure where NodeTrees embedded inside Materials (and the Materials themselves) still failed to receive their cascade animation Actions during a variant switch. In Blender 5.3+, ActionSlot changed its identifier API from target_id_type to id_type, causing the addon's slot dictionary to build blank keys (None). Furthermore, _bind_action_and_slot previously attempted to map internal NodeTrees using their generic name "Shader Nodetree" instead of the deterministic generated token tracker format (e.g. MaterialName_Nodes), resulting in total lookup failures. Action binding now correctly abstracts the id_type property cross-version and dynamically overrides label lookups to guarantee 100% accurate slot identification for sub-datablocks.
  15. Headless Compositor Mute Crash: Fixed a critical bug where batch rendering in background (-b) mode caused Blender to crash entirely when tks_output_compositor was set to False. The render_init handler was gracefully muting the compositor nodes, but the resulting depsgraph update triggered Cycles' update_pause(), which relies on context.area (a viewport datablock that evaluates to None in true headless mode). The background cli_worker.py now proactively unregisters all rendering handlers and manually mutes the nodes in a safe, static context immediately before triggering the render core.
  16. Stale Action-Without-Slot State (VL Switch Engine): Fixed a persistent headless batch render failure where materials and node trees received the cascade Action but had action_slot=None, completely disabling material animation evaluation. The root cause: the unified VL switch sweep (apply_vl_switch_unified) correctly skipped slot assignment when no matching slot existed in the action, but left the stale action reference in place from a previous handler pass. The engine now actively clears the action from any target that has no matching slot, preventing the broken action=X, slot=None state that silences keyframe evaluation in Blender 5.x.
  17. Garbled Codebase Telemetry (Process UTF-8): Cleaned all non-ASCII mojibake encoding issues (such as typographic em-dashes) from the entire source code base, completely eliminating garbled UTF-8 errors in the final codebase audit.
  18. Operator Verb Distribution Mismatch: Remedied all operator class extraction discrepancies in the stats.md evaluation logic by forcing case-sensitive REGEX matching on CamelCase variables, successfully restoring accurate CRUD Verb-Action categorization in the telemetry automated review.
  19. Codebase Automation Python Handlers: Migrated codebase telemetry generation from fragile, raw PowerShell data pipes directly to stable Python run environments inside dev/ to enforce robust execution paths for Get-ChildItem calls over all nested takes_for_blender module directories.
  20. Pinned Objects Action Mismatch Warning: Fixed a false-positive UI warning where objects correctly pinned via the View Layer pinning system triggered an "Action Mismatch" alert in the Navigation Panel. The verification logic now properly checks the View Layer pinning cache instead of just the manual override flag.
  21. Cascade UI Alt+Click Latency: Fixed a persistent visual latency bug where clearing a cascade property (Actions, Cameras, Worlds, Views) via Alt+Click erased the property but failed to visually refresh the UI panels until mouse movement. signal_redraw_deferred() now forces an immediate visual update, bypassing layout locks.
  22. VL Switch UnboundLocalError: Fixed a fatal UnboundLocalError: cannot access local variable 'vl_key' during fast ViewLayer switches. The ViewLayer string identifier is now correctly hoisted above the evaluation block to guarantee safe cache invalidation post-sweep.
  23. Cycles Frame Deletion Crash: Fixed a critical EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION in Cycles where deleting a Scene while active triggered a panic due to context.area references holding invalidated memory.
  24. Python Iterator Corruption on Hide Set: Fixed severe Blender iterator corruption during variant switch visibility iterations hide_set application by safely casting the internal all_objects generator stream to a resolved list.
  25. Restored Isolated Visibility Properties: Restored 6 missing isolated visibility properties to ensure complete tracking coverage during variant assignments.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Process Monitor Tree Hierarchy: Upgraded the Process Monitor with a hierarchical feature-group system. Processes are now categorized under 6 feature groups (e.g., Core, UI Sync, Rest State) with tree-style chevron expand/collapse interactions and master group toggles to quickly bisect viewport lag issues by feature.
  2. Monitor Navigation Switcher: Integrated a 3-way radio-style monitor switcher directly into the sidebar headers, allowing fluid navigation between the Process Monitor, Debug Console, and VL Switch Profiler tabs.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Rest State Icon Styling: The rest state indicator (ghost icon) in the Takes tree has been overhauled. It now uses the theme-native blue active/depressed toggle button styling instead of the red alert box flag, cleanly reflecting a standard engaged state rather than an error condition.
  2. Naming Token Evaluation Optimization: The _build_token_values system now performs an early-exit check against the target template string, successfully bypassing expensive Blender context lookups for tokens that aren't actively used in the naming template.
  3. Pinned JSON Loading Performance: Added a fast-path an early-exit guard to utils/pinned.py that skips standard json.loads() processing when reading uninitialized or empty '[]' pinned storage properties.
  4. Cascade Animation Parsing Performance: Added an optimized O(S) pre-scan of sequence animation slot handles using native action.layers and channelbags. This replaces the historically expensive get_slot_fcurves with an instant O(1) handle lookup during cascade logic assignment and fast view-layer switching.
  5. Reference Name Resolution: Upgraded the fallback rest state name matcher inside apply_vl_switch_unified from a slow O(N) sub-string loop to an instant O(1) dictionary lookup.
  6. Cascade Property Update Callbacks: Cascade override properties (tks_action, tks_camera, tks_world, tks_compositor) now use update= callbacks to natively invalidate caches and signal immediate UI redraws, eliminating the previous sluggish 200ms background polling lag when rapidly assigning new cascade overrides in the sidebar.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Pinned Object Target Guard: Fixed a crash/bypass where an obsolete signature _is_pinned(obj, view_layer) was called without the required scene parameter inside the core View Layer switch engine mechanism.
  2. Batch Render Output Rule Signature: Fixed a silent TypeError in the Batch Renderer caused by passing an obsolete context argument to _apply_output_rule_presets(). This swallowed exception previously aborted the entire cascade pipeline before object actions could be applied, leading to batch renders missing all animations.
  3. CLI Worker Handler Resolution: Hardened the headless CLI worker's reflective module lookup. The action assignment engine now correctly scans the canonical core.cascade_actions module first before falling back to the re-export façade in core.cascade, ensuring resilience against internal codebase restructuring.
  4. Double-Snap Keyframe Destruction: Fixed a critical bug causing objects to randomly reset to their Rest State during a ViewLayer switch, destroying timeline progress. The post-switch _deferred_snap timer suffered from an empty keyed-paths exclusion set that caused it to incorrectly overwrite properties. The deferred pass has been entirely removed — all state snapping now executes instantly during the unified context switch.
  5. Phantom Rest-Snaps from Stale Trackers: Fixed a severe UI and logic leak where _slot_poll_tracker and _obj_action_tracker dictionaries were never cleared on ViewLayer switch. The stale trackers tricked the background system into believing the user manually deleted actions, causing ghost rest-snaps. An event bus subscriber _on_vl_switch_pre_inspector now safely purges tracker state right before cascade resolution.
  6. NodeTree Slot Bleeding & Mismatch: Fixed a systemic failure where materials sharing the generic string name Shader Nodetree stole animation slots from each other. Sub-string matchers simply failed to disambiguate. Added robust NODETREE type blacklists to both the fast ViewLayer switch and cascade loop, safely bypassing the fallback dictionary mapping for non-object generic instances.
  7. Deferred Cascade Sequential Delay: Refactored the _deferred_cascade_apply and _deferred_cascade_from_tree execution pipelines in ops_crud.py to strip out sequential processing delays between Camera and Action context switching. State updates are now cleanly atomic and functionally instantaneous.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Watchlist Strict 5-Column Hierarchy: The Inspector watchlist compact mode has been completely redesigned with a strict 5-column layout: [NODETREE] [MATERIAL] [DATA] [MODIFIER] [OBJECT]. This ensures perfect vertical alignment for datablocks across all object rows in the UI, replacing the old shifting dynamic row layout.
  2. Geo Nodes / Modifier Column Separation: Geometry Nodes and Modifiers now have their own dedicated column, separated from Material Shader Nodes, preventing conflation between visual and structural sub-data targets.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Dynamic Datablock Filtering: In the new 5-column layout, unsupported icons naturally hide themselves according to the object type (e.g. Cameras won't show Material or Modifier icons, Empties only show Object icons). This removes clutter while preserving the grid alignment.
  2. Compact Icon Deduplication: Fixed an issue where the Inspector drew duplicate compact icons for the same datablock type. Consolidated datablock popovers so any NodeTree routes cleanly to the correct owner without duplicating the UI triggers.
  3. Compositor Node Muting: Batch render and CLI worker no longer disable scene.render.use_compositing to suppress compositor output. Instead, individual File Output nodes are muted via render_init_handler and restored in render_post_handler. This prevents transparent renders when File Output nodes are the only output path.
  4. F12 Smart Output Toggle: New smart_output_apply_to_f12 preference allows Blender's native F12 and Ctrl+F12 render operations to optionally respect the Standard Output and Compositor Output toggles from the Smart Output system.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. VL Switch Keyed Cache Poisoning: Fixed a systemic failure where all unpinned objects failed to snap to their rest state during View Layer switches (SNAP=0). The build_vl_keyed_cache Phase B (object-level override scan) ran before the fast sweep's UNASSIGN step, reading the outgoing cascade action's FCurves and adding them to the incoming VL's keyed_paths exclusion set. Added a skip_object_scan flag to skip Phase B during the pre-unassign window, and cache invalidation post-sweep so the deferred snap timer rebuilds with correct post-assignment data.
  2. "Blunt" Cascade Trigger Performance Leak: Fixed a critical optimization issue where updates to any cascade tier outside the active viewport (e.g. background scenes or shadowed Global properties) incorrectly triggered massive O(N) apply_overrides() evaluation. "Impact Analysis Guards" were added using get_cascade_winner to restrict cascades exclusively to changes that actively "win" the current viewport's evaluation context.
  3. Colossal Object Action Clearing Bug: Fixed a massive performance drop (and cross-context mutation bug) when clearing manual Action overrides (Alt+Click on tiers or X on objects). The _on_obj_tks_action_update callback and ops_action.py popover handlers previously bypassed the cascade natively and triggered a brutal global action deletion (_clear_actions_on_watched) across the entire project even if the affected tier was in the background. The popovers now safely unset the property using standard RNA assignment instead of property_unset() (which bypassed python callbacks), letting the native Impact Analysis guard cleanly evaluate if clearing the tier actually affects the active workspace natively, reducing a global O(N) mutation to O(1) isolation.
  4. Cascade UI Staleness: Fixed an issue where the cascade UI remained stale after variant and tag assignment operations (including clearing via Alt+Click). Added update callbacks to tks_vsw_cascade and tks_assigned_tag properties to immediately invalidate the View Layer cascade cache and signal a UI redraw, ensuring icons accurately reflect local override states.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Tree View Sync Optimization: Tightened the background context synchronization timer from 2Hz to 4Hz (250ms) to provide instantaneous feedback for structural changes like renaming and data updates.
  2. Context-Aware Add Menu: Replaced the sidebar's isolated Smart Add logic with the global, intelligent Shift+A menu style. Ensures UI consistency across all Add operations.
  3. Signal Redraw Consolidation: Replaced localized _force_panel_redraw() calls in group handlers with the global signal_redraw() pattern to standardize UI updates.
  4. Automation Defaults: All automation settings in addon preferences now default to True out-of-the-box, except auto_rename_actions which is explicitly disabled, allowing users to freely rename their scene hierarchy without auto-mutating their tracked actions.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Rest State VL Snap Bypass: Fixed a critical flaw in the fast-sweep architecture where empty View Layers (with no cascade action assigned) explicitly bypassed the Rest State snap routine. The system now guarantees returning to the frame-0 baseline pose even when no target action is set.
  2. Renamed-Object Cached Link Severing: Fixed a major disconnect where renaming an object natively in Blender permanently dropped its connection to the cached Rest action baseline. Integrated a robust name-substring fallback to permanently match renamed clones generated by iter_anim_targets.
  3. Data Sub-Targets Pinned Exclusion: Pinning an object to lock its transform incorrectly aborted the entire discovery sweep for the object's children properties. Pinned meshes, cameras, and lights now properly preserve their Material and GeometryNode variations across VL layers.
  4. Canonical Identity Mapping Silences: Fixed native assignment and rename matching for Edge-Case API geometries (Speakers, LightProbes, MetaBalls, TextCurves) that were resolving incorrectly to generic 'OBJECT' types instead of their targeted API strings.
  5. Disabled-Automations Slot Detachment: Fixed a structural flaw in the 5.0+ slotted action implementation where turning off auto_rename_slots permanently orphaned objects during view layer context switching. Integrated a "Stale-Slot Memory Bridge" across vl_switch_fast.py and cascade_actions.py that captures an object's pre-switch slot identifier and leverages it as a fallback lookup, guaranteeing assignment integrity even when object names and their underlying slot names diverge.
  6. Nested Property Snap Bypass: Fixed a major regression in the fast-sweep engine where rest values for modifiers, data arrays, and node sockets were silently aborted. Path resolution now traverses the path_resolve hierarchy iteratively, permitting setattr to correctly mutate nested child properties without throwing swallowed AttributeErrors.
  7. Empty Slot UI Bloat: Fixed a UI regression in the Inspector where JIT-assigned materials without keyframes caused their parent objects to appear in the watchlist as ghost entries. Modifed the fallback scanning logic to correctly identify and ignore empty cascade action slot assignments.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Re-apply Cascade Operator: New TKS_OT_ReApplyCascade operator restores the cascade action to all watched objects after manual native UI clearing.
  2. Unpin 3-Choice Popup: The pin/unpin operator now provides a confirmation dialog with 3 choices when unpinning an object with a divergent action.
  3. Automated Operator Tests: Added comprehensive pytest suite covering critical Inspector and UI operators.
  4. Developer Knowledge Base: Established a centralized developer documentation index and migrated deep architecture documents from the old TKS-Archive.
  5. Architectural Documentation: Added comprehensive architecture documentation covering Naming Config Immunity, the Slot Awareness Paradigm, 6-Tier Cascade Action Assignment, and the Change Warning System.
  6. Process Monitor Gating: Handlers can now be explicitly disabled via the Process Monitor UI while remaining "alive" for the watchdog, preventing execution of heavy payloads when debugging Viewport lag.
  7. Context-Aware Naming Engine: Added generate_cascade_action_name() helper and missing generators to naming_utils.py to auto-detect and resolve VLV/VL/Scene tiers dynamically.
  8. Batch Render Progress Bar: Added a total batch render progress bar above the stats row in the render queue, showing percentage, active task, and estimated time remaining.
  9. Context-Aware Shift+A Menu: Added a new global Shift+A creation menu that dynamically adapts to the blue bar selection in the tree view (Scene Group, Scene, VL Group, View Layer, VL Version). Intelligently enables/disables options based on contextual hierarchy. Added to Global Hotkey Dispatcher.
  10. Expand Smart Output Tokens: Added preset, workspace, timestamp, state, part, variant_index, and collection tokens directly to the Smart Output Engine. Parameterized variants tokens with :N indexing support for precise targeting.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Auto-Assign Defaults: Changed default values of auto_assign_vl_actions, auto_create_rest_action, and auto_rename_actions to True. This ensures that on fresh installations, animating an object per-View Layer automatically assigns the action to the cascade, keeping the animation intact across View Layer switches out-of-the-box.
  2. Event-Driven Navigation Warnings: Replaced live-calculated warning systems in the Navigation panel with event-driven dirty-flag caches. All four warning types (ref drifts, preset sync, missing presets, slot mismatches) now share the same pattern: draw() only reads cached results, never recalculates.
  3. Debounced Transform Detection: Added a 0.3s debounce timer for transform/geometry depsgraph ticks. During object dragging/orbiting, the timer keeps resetting with zero overhead. When interaction stops, the timer fires once and invalidates all caches.
  4. Universal Drift Detection: Fixed universal drift detection by removing the obsolete action-assignment guard in get_rest_drifts, enabling drift detection for all objects.
  5. Dumb UI Standards Enforcement: Rewrote the Navigation panel, Context tree view, and Inspector panels to adhere strictly to the "Dumb UI" pattern. Panels now only read from pre-computed caches, eliminating expensive lookup operations during draw().
  6. Watchlist Sync Performance: O(N) array filtering and statistics gathering in the Inspector watchlist are now cached during the _sync_timer background handler, reducing draw() overhead.
  7. NodeTree Owner Lookups: Replaced 4 inline O(N) scans over Materials/Worlds/Lights/Scenes with a unified NodeTree\u2192Owner pointer cache during watchlist sync.
  8. Re-ordered Cascade Pipeline: Moved the Rest Snap stage from Step 5 to Step 2 in the cascade sequence to provide a stable baseline before resolving cascade actions.
  9. VL Switch Event Migration: Refactored View Layer switch detection from a monolithic depsgraph polling handler to a consolidated event-bus system, reducing redundant O(N) scene scans.
  10. Process Monitor UI Sync: Process monitor tree rebuild sync is decoupled from value updates, throttling the Tree UI updates to 1Hz while keeping process lists intact, preventing infinite redraw loops and negative heartbeat durations.
  11. Naming Strategy Enforcement: Consolidated all creation and cascade operators across 14 files (Actions, Cameras, Compositors, Worlds) to strictly use the central naming_utils.py token engine, eliminating scattered hardcoded template logic.
  12. Consolidate Token Sheet UI: Completely refactored the Syntax Cheat Sheet UI by extracting the duplicated layout logic into a single shared drawing function used by both the docked panel and floating popover.
  13. Sub-Tab Navigation in Preferences: Modernized Addon Preferences with a horizontal top-level tab bar and a secondary horizontal sub-tab bar to heavily reduce collapsible-panel clutter and vertical scrolling.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Action Loss Tracker Key Collision: All ShaderNodeTrees share the Blender default name Shader Nodetree, causing the action tracker dictionary to overwrite entries across materials and world node trees. Tracker keys now use unique slot labels from iter_anim_targets (e.g. Aluminium_blue_Nodes vs World_Nodes).
  2. Infinite Rest-Snap Loop: Clearing an action from the native Blender animation panel triggered an infinite cycle: Pass 1b detected action loss \u2192 ref-snap fired \u2192 cascade re-assigned action \u2192 next depsgraph cycle re-detected the same loss. Fixed by updating the tracker to None after each ref-snap.
  3. Pass 1b Suppressed During Cascade Apply: Action loss detection (Pass 1b) was nested inside the _skip_fresh guard, causing it to be suppressed during undo/redo and cascade application. Moved outside the guard to run unconditionally on every depsgraph callback.
  4. Fresh Install Animation Data Loss: Animation data was lost on fresh plugin installs where auto_assign_vl_actions preference defaulted to False.
  5. Fresh Action Assignment TypeError: Silent failure (TypeError) during fresh action assignment on the ViewLayer and Scene cascade tiers due to incorrect PointerProperty assignment logic.
  6. Empty Cascade Action After Merge: Assigning an existing action to a newly created ViewLayer cascade action left the cascade action empty (missing FCurve merge).
  7. Nested Node Socket Snapping: Refactored snap_single_to_rest with a robust _apply_value helper that correctly writes to nested node socket properties (using setattr iteratively) instead of relying on flawed path_resolve which yielded copies.
  8. Preset Warning UI Lag: The preset warning button in the navigation panel didn't update immediately after saving/reverting preset changes via the context or N-panels. Wired invalidate_nav_warnings() into all preset operators (Save, Revert, Accept, Manage Orphans) to instantly update the UI cache.
  9. Preset Engine Cache Sync: The preset engine's internal _preset_state_cache was not being cleared when invalidate_nav_warnings() was called. This caused is_preset_dirty() to return stale "DIRTY" results even after a successful revert. Fixed by calling invalidate_preset_cache() inside the centralized invalidation function.
  10. 10Hz UI Rebuild Spam: Prevented the Inspector UI from initiating full signal_redraw rebuilds 10 times per second during simple viewport orbiting. Re-syncs only occur when structural datablocks change.
  11. Type-Aware Slot Fallback: Reverted the fragile naming-template slot matching mechanism to the stable, robust v0.5.5 system, incorporating safe type-aware fallbacks that fix Material NodeTree slot auto-assignments.
  12. Signal Redraw Contract Gaps: Systematically audited all panel operators and patched 27 missing UI-refresh signals across the codebase to ensure instant feedback.
  13. 5Hz UI Polling Lag: The background slot-removal poller _poll_slot_removal caused a noticeable system stutter every 0.2 seconds by polling all 2,000+ objects. It now only polls context.selected_objects, making background execution instantaneous.
  14. Viewport Selection Sync Freeze: Fixed a crippling issue where the Inspector viewport selection sync incorrectly identified background geometry modifications (modifiers, playback) as datablock structure changes. This triggered thousands of redundant O(N) scene evaluations per second, causing a severe 7 FPS viewport lag during simple dragging.
  15. Continuous Autokey Dropped Frames: The Autokey Mirror now incorporates a strict action-gate: the O(N) evaluation is immediately deferred during continuous viewport drags until an active keyframe is physically dropped. Also enforced strict evaluation filters to only evaluate selected objects.
  16. Playback Disruption: Integrated Playback Gates into both the Viewport Selection Sync and Autokey Mirror handlers; neither background handler will execute while the timeline is playing, strictly favoring native Blender FPS over Inspector sync.
  17. Viewport Object Drag Lag: Fixed an O(N) evaluation stutter where continuous Autokey action-updates during a mesh drag bypassed the object filter and unnecessarily executed full Reference Path parsing on collateral Scene, World, and Material datablocks 60 times a second.
  18. Autokey Mirror Failure: Resolved a total failure of the Autokey system caused by Python datablock wrapper hashes mismatching between depsgraph.updates and context.selected_objects, resulting in the target object being erroneously omitted during key insertion.
  19. Viewport UI Preset Stutter: Fixed a severe framerate drop during pure viewport object manipulation where collateral Scene updates inadvertently bypassed the transform filter, repeatedly forcing the Navigation Panel to rebuild the preset warning cache and evaluate 280+ render properties 60 times a second.
  20. Pass1b Viewport Diagnostic Stutter: Masked collateral Scene and Collection depsgraph updates out of the _has_data_updates gate. This correctly suppresses the O(N) Pass1b Slot-Diag diagnostic scan and NodeTree owner invalidations from firing redundantly during continuous viewport object manipulation.
  21. Inspector UI Synchronization Lag: Enforced the 'Data Sync + Paint Signal' contract across Watchlist and Inspector UI lists. Toggling Action/Slot modes, clearing filters, or selecting an Action now executes a synchronous data rebuild before signal_redraw() is called, eliminating the 'empty list flash' bug. Search filters now natively trigger debounced background rebuilds during typing.
  22. Rest Action Snapping Interference: Removed the 'Reference Contamination Fix' guard. If a user natively edits or drags an object while the Rest_State action is assigned, the addon no longer forcefully snaps the object back to its cached position. This completely restores the ability to use Alt+G/R/S and manual dragging workflows natively, shifting the paradigm to treat direct user edits to the rest state as intentional.
  23. VL Switch Rest Action Poisoning: Switching view layers while Native Autokey was ON inadvertently inserted the programmatic snap values into the active Rest Action. The programmatic snap loop now safely executes with autokey temporarily suppressed.
  24. Dead Autokey Mirror Guard: The programmatic autokey-mirror suppression system (_suppress_until) was set by four different systems but skipped executing entirely because the handler was missing the time evaluation logic. The dead code has been wired up and functions as designed.
  25. VL Switch Rest Snap Silent Failure: Switching View Layers correctly detected ref drifts but silently skipped the snap phase. Root cause: the ref cache stores slot names from slot.name_display (e.g. Suzanne) while the snap lookup used template-generated labels from iter_anim_targets (e.g. Suzanne_MESH). Both snap_cached_diffs and the Fast Sweep now register targets under both their template label and raw target.name for fallback matching. Additionally, build_rest_cache now strips Blender's 2-char ID prefixes (OB, MA, NT, etc.) when falling back to slot.identifier.
  26. Tree View Hotkey Shadowing: All shared shortcuts (Alt+G, F2, DEL, Ctrl+N, Ctrl+T, Ctrl+I) were broken across Context, Tags, and Variant tree views due to Blender's Window keymap not supporting horizontal fall-through. Three modules registered the same keys, with only the last one receiving events. Refactored into a centralized Global Dispatcher (ops_global_shortcuts.py) with individual dispatcher classes per key action. Also fixed a silent Ctrl+I native hijacking bug and replaced event.alt sniffing in GroupOrUngroup operators with explicit action EnumProperty for safe Python dispatch.
  27. VLV Action Naming Regression: Fixed a critical issue where VL Version (VLV) actions received the wrong generated name (stripping the {version} token) because the system defaulted to generate_viewlayer_action_name instead of retaining the version token.
  28. Tree Hierarchy False Warnings: Fixed false-positive rename warnings and broken tree children for VL Versions caused by hardcoded viewlayer-level naming in logic.py's _get_slot_mismatches.
  29. Stale StructRNA Crash: Fixed ReferenceError during Inspector list drawing when targets contained stale StructRNA objects after a structural update.
  30. Grouping Multiselect Integrity: Enforced multiselect integrity for grouping operators (Ctrl+G), preventing unselected items from being erroneously gathered into the new group.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Watchlist Datablock Popover: TKS_OT_DatablockPopover operator enables per-datablock action and slot management directly from compact mode icons. Supports Alt+Click to clear, filtered slot dropdown (matching slotted view), and path-resolved target navigation.
  2. Datablock-Aware Operators: TKS_OT_DatablockClear, TKS_OT_DatablockNewAction, TKS_OT_DatablockAddSlot handle action/slot management for non-Object targets (Material, NodeTree, Mesh, ShapeKeys) via dot-path resolution.
  3. Watchlist Dynamic Icon Row: Compact mode replaces generic Action/Slot icons with type-aware datablock icons from iter_anim_targets(). Icons are dimmed when no action is assigned, bright when active.
  4. Drag-to-Pin: Pin toggle in the watchlist now uses a BoolProperty + prop() instead of an operator, enabling Blender's native drag-to-toggle across multiple rows. Update callback syncs to pin storage via set_pinned().
  5. Shared Datablock User Count: New _count_object_users() helper accurately counts scene objects referencing a datablock, replacing the inaccurate target.users count in popover tooltips.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Watchlist Compact Mode Fixed-Width Icons: Icon column uses ui_units_x (matching tree view pattern) instead of proportional split(factor), so icons stay at a fixed position when widening the N-panel.
  2. Watchlist Filter Stats Pre-Computed: Pinned/unpinned counts are now computed during the sync phase from source_items (before filtering) and stored as WM properties. Stats always show true totals regardless of active filter state.
  3. Pin Icon Spacing & Dimming: Pin icon scale_x increased from 0.7 to 0.85 for better click target. Unpinned icons appear dimmed (active = False) so pinned objects visually stand out.
  4. Filter Icons Disabled When Empty: Pinned/unpinned filter icons are grayed out and unclickable when their respective count is zero, preventing users from activating an empty filter.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. obj_has_any_preset UnboundLocalError: Fixed conditional import of obj_has_any_preset in draw_collections.py where it was accessed outside its guard block, causing UnboundLocalError when the overflow check ran.
  2. Watchlist Filter Stats Wrong Source: Filter stats (pinned/unpinned counts) were computed from the already-filtered wm.tks_inspector_objects list. Now computed from pre-filter source_items in sync, ensuring correct totals when filters are active.
  3. Tree View Creation Desync: Creating a new View Layer or Scene via the tree view + menu or duplication hotkeys failed to show the new item until a manual refresh occurred. Operators bypassed the ensure_default_groups() phase before triggering the UI rebuild. Added explicit default group registration to TKS_OT_AddViewLayer, TKS_OT_AddSceneToGroup, and TKS_OT_DuplicateTreeItem immediately before sync.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. World Rule at VLG/SG/VLV Tiers: Added tks_world_rule StringProperty to TKS_VLGroup, TKS_SceneGroup, and TKS_VLVersion PropertyGroups, enabling world rule overrides at all cascade tiers.
  2. World & Camera in _TIER_PRESET_FIELDS: world_preset and camera_preset are now included in _TIER_PRESET_FIELDS, enabling per-tier preset inheritance and clearing for these types.
  3. World & Material Preset Creation: TKS_OT_CreateRenderPreset now handles world and material preset types, writing the file_key to the correct config field after save.
  4. TKS_OT_SelectPreset Scene/VL Targeting: Added scene_name and vl_name properties to TKS_OT_SelectPreset, allowing preset selection to target a specific scene/VL instead of always using context.scene.
  5. Global Output Gear Preset Awareness: The global row output gear icon now lights up when any preset is assigned (global_has_any_preset), not just when an output rule exists.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Camera Preset Panel Disabled State: Camera preset UI is now consistently visible but disabled (grayed out) when the active object is not the cascade-assigned camera. Info box shows "Assign a camera in the cascade" when no camera is set, instead of showing "Select 'None'".
  2. Preset Capture/Apply tks_ Filtering: Camera and world preset capture (capture.py) now excludes all tks_-prefixed properties from serialization. Apply (apply.py) skips tks_-prefixed properties during restore, preventing cascade-managed fields from leaking into preset JSON files.
  3. preset_selector_row Scene/VL Override: preset_selector_row in styles.py accepts optional scene/vl parameters, forwarding them to resolve_preset_for_tier, TKS_OT_SearchRenderPreset, and the revert operator. Enables cross-scene preset selection from popovers.
  4. Output Rules Refactoring: ops_output_rules.py restructured with improved tier routing and consistent operator patterns across all tiers (VLV, VL, VLG, Scene, SG, Global).
  5. Timer Execution Order: _sync_timer in handlers.py reordered: fingerprint check now runs BEFORE the VL-snap code. Ensures the 0.5s move guard is set before the snap evaluates it, preventing blue bar snap on the same tick as a rename.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Group Rename Not Updating Tree View: Double-click renaming of Scene Groups (SG) or VL Groups (VLG) did not refresh the tree view. Root cause: rename went through Blender's prop() widget triggering _on_sg_name_update/_on_vlg_name_update, which only handled name uniqueness but never called sync_all_viewlayers. Added _sync_after_group_rename() helper that triggers tree sync, cache invalidation, panel redraw, and move guard.
  2. VL Rename Blue Bar Snapping: Renaming a View Layer caused the blue selection bar to snap to the active VL. Root cause: the 10Hz _sync_timer ran VL-snap BEFORE the fingerprint check, so on the rename-detection tick the bar was already snapped before the move guard could be set. Fixed by reordering the timer to run fingerprint detection first.
  3. Stale PropertyGroup Crash in find_vl_version_set: Cached PropertyGroup references in _vs_cache could become stale during depsgraph callbacks, causing EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION. Added id_data validity guard and try/except (ReferenceError, RuntimeError) protection.
  4. get_active_vl_version Crash: Added try/except (ReferenceError, RuntimeError, OSError) guard around version set access to prevent crashes when RNA data is freed mid-callback.
  5. Undo Crash on StringProperty Overrides: Using native property_unset on statically registered StringProperty fields unlinked the C-memory pointer entirely, causing EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION during Blender's native Undo/Redo state reconstruction when the UI attempted to draw the freed pointer. Replaced all property_unset calls on string fields with a safe_unset helper that gracefully clears the value to "" instead, preserving C-memory layout across World, Camera, Action, Compositor, and Output cascade clearing operators.
  6. Undo Crash on Stale UI Caches: Undo operations modify Blender's native C-memory without necessarily changing collection lengths, leading to stale RNA pointers inside python-side UI caches (_sg_cache, _vlg_cache, _vs_cache). Added explicit cache invalidation to _handle_undo_redo_sync in handlers.py to guarantee the Takes tree rebuilds its list elements from fresh memory immediately after any Undo/Redo event.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Log Level Toggle Buttons: Per-level toggle buttons (Debug, Info, Warning, Error) in the Debug preferences tab. Each level can be independently enabled/disabled, filtering log messages before any string formatting occurs.
  2. Tree View Duplicate Hotkeys: Shift+D (full copy) and Alt+D (linked copy) for duplicating the selected scene, view layer, or VL version directly from the tree view. Source is the blue-bar selection, not the active VL.
  3. Auto-Rename Preview Thumbnails: When a scene or VL is renamed (double-click, F2, outliner, or any source), the corresponding tks_previews/ thumbnail files are automatically renamed to match. Detected via the existing depsgraph fingerprint handler.
  4. Full Datablock Coverage — Rest State: Mirror (I-key), revert (Alt+I), autokey, and non-keyed edit rest cache update paths now handle all _SUPPORTED_TYPES: Object, Light, Camera, Material, World, Scene, NodeTree. Previously only Object was covered.
  5. Datablock Coverage Documentation: New doc/datablock_coverage.md documenting coverage status across all Blender 5.1 animatable datablocks and editor areas.
  6. VL-Switch Import Guard Test (test_vl_switch_imports.py): Structural integration test that AST-parses both core/vl_handlers.py and core/vl_switch.py to verify all deferred imports resolve correctly. Catches silent breakage when modules are moved or renamed.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. apply_variant_cascade Public API: Renamed _apply_variant_cascade → apply_variant_cascade across 14 files (variant_switch, batch_render, core, operators). Removes the misleading internal-only underscore prefix on a function consumed by 5 external packages.
  2. VL Orchestration Split: Decomposed the monolithic vl_handlers.py (1241 lines) into 4 focused modules: vl_switch.py (depsgraph handler + continuous healing, 580 lines), vl_lifecycle.py (load/save + undo/redo, 400 lines), vl_unassign.py (nuclear unassign, 120 lines), and vl_handlers.py (pure-core utilities + registration delegation, 252 lines). Eliminates reverse dependency where core/ imported from features/, panels/, and operators/.
  3. Selection-Scoped Rest Cache: Replaced full-scene file-load cache build with selection-scoped approach. Cache snapshots only selected objects + their data blocks on selection change, with incremental re-snapshot on property edits. Removes ~190 lines (chunked timer, file-load handler, heavy-scene threshold).
  4. VLV Preset Inheritance Removed: VL Versions (VLV) no longer inherit preset values from parent tiers (VLG, Scene, SG, Global). VLV preset selector rows now only display directly assigned presets, preventing confusing dimmed inherited values from cluttering the VLV output popover.
  5. VLV Rule Inheritance Removed: VLV camera, world, and output popovers no longer display inherited rule labels from VL/Scene/Global tiers, and no longer use get_effective_rule() or resolve_cascade() for the rule parameter. Each VLV popover now reads its own tks_*_rule field directly.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Gear Icon Alt+Click Clearing World/Camera Presets: Alt+click on the output gear icon was unintentionally clearing world and camera preset fields because _clear_tier_presets iterated the full _PRESET_FIELDS list. Split into _OUTPUT_PRESET_FIELDS (render-category only) for gear icon clearing, preserving the full list for cascade resolution.
  2. World Popover Alt+Click Missing Preset Clearing: Alt+click on world popover icons across all 6 tiers (Global, SG, VLG, VL, VLV, Scene) did not clear the tks_world_preset field. Added preset clearing alongside existing pointer and rule clearing.
  3. Camera Popover Alt+Click Missing Fields: Alt+click on camera popover icons across all 5 tiers did not clear tks_camera_rule or tks_camera_preset fields. Added rule and preset clearing alongside existing pointer clearing.
  4. Depsgraph Crash on Preset Assignment (EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION): Assigning a camera preset triggered a segfault in RNA_property_collection_length via the depsgraph handler chain (handle_viewlayer_switch → _check_warning_state → _get_slot_mismatches → get_active_vl_version). Root cause: _vs_cache stored direct PropertyGroup references that became stale during property mutations. Added id_data validity guards in find_vl_version_set and try/except protection in get_active_vl_version.
  5. World Preset Registration: world_preset was missing from _PRESET_FIELDS and _TIER_PRESET_FIELDS, preventing world JSON presets from being assigned or stored at any cascade tier.
  6. Watchdog Log Storm: Dead-process detection now logs at most once per 30 seconds per process (was every 2s watchdog tick). Cooldown entries are automatically pruned on process recovery and unregistration.
  7. Scalar Property Keyframe Failure: insert_rest_keyframe passed index=0 to keyframe_insert() for scalar properties like Light.energy, which depsgraph reports as array_index=0. Now probes the resolved property for __getitem__ to detect true arrays; scalar properties fall through to the no-index branch.
  8. Rest Cache Stale for Object Transforms: Non-keyed-edit update path only iterated FCurve-backed cache entries. Object transforms cached from _TRANSFORM_PATHS were never refreshed when the property had no FCurve. Now re-snapshots the entire ID block via _snapshot_id_block() on any property edit.
  9. 4 Broken Deferred Imports in VL Pipeline: Fixed stale import paths silently swallowed by try/except ImportError guards: _last_applied_preset (wrong source module), _auto_hide_timer (removed from health_check), mark_sync_dirty (wrong package path). Preset cache was never cleared on VL switch; tree sync fingerprint was never reset after undo/redo.
  10. NodeTree Slot Name Mismatch on VL Switch: JIT merge created NODETREE slots with a hardcoded {owner}_Nodes naming convention instead of using the user-configurable naming template. apply_to_target expected template-generated names, causing match=NO for shader editor keyframes. Now uses generate_slot_name() with proper MATERIAL_NODETREE / WORLD_NODETREE slot types.
  11. Cascade Action Self-Merge Loop: After JIT merge assigned the cascade action to a non-Object target, the depsgraph re-detected it as a "fresh" action and queued it for processing. Added cascade identity guard that resolves the current cascade via resolve_cascade() and skips re-detection.
  12. Merged Source Actions Not Cleaned Up: Fresh actions created by Blender autokey (FabricAction.002, LT-BACKAction, etc.) were merged into cascade but remained in bpy.data.actions with use_fake_user=False, cluttering the action browser until save/reload. Added deferred cleanup timer that removes zero-user source actions 0.5 s after merge.
  13. I-Key Mirror Failing for Non-Object Types: Slot resolution in the autokey mirror handler used bpy.data.objects.get() for all ID-block types — failed silently for Light, Camera, Material, etc. Now routes through _resolve_id_block() to the correct bpy.data collection.
  14. Alt+I Revert Failing for Non-Object Types: Rest cache had no entry for properties keyed for the first time (e.g., light energy). Mirror handler now writes to the rest cache alongside the ref keyframe, ensuring Alt+I has a value to snap back to.
  15. Non-Keyed Edit Cache Stale for Non-Objects: The global edit path (autokey OFF, no action update) only updated rest cache for Objects. Now processes all _SUPPORTED_TYPES, with Objects filtered by is_updated_transform/geometry and non-Objects accepting any depsgraph update.
  16. Autokey Rest Contamination: When autokey keyed an Object whose cascade-assigned action was Rest_State, the post-edit value was written directly into the ref keyframe, corrupting the neutral default state. The autokey mirror now detects contamination and reverts the ref keyframe to the cached pre-edit value via the selection-scoped rest cache.
  17. Stale Depsgraph Action Resolution: The autokey mirror read animation_data.action from the depsgraph evaluated copy, which returns None after file load until a VL switch forces re-evaluation. Now resolves action and slot from the original ID block via _resolve_id_block(), fixing the „first move never works" issue.
  18. Initial Rest Cache Snapshot: Added 0.1 s one-shot timer on load_post that snapshots the current selection's neutral values immediately after file load, ensuring the rest cache is populated before any user edits.
  19. Tree Refresh After Remove/Add: RemoveScene, RemoveViewLayer, RemoveContextItem, and AddViewLayer (non-group path) now call sync_all_viewlayers so the tree list updates immediately after these operations.
  20. Variant Tree Fixed-Width Layout: All variant tree row types (Product, State, Part) now use the row_main → left + right pattern with right.alignment = 'RIGHT' and explicit ui_units_x, matching the Takes tree layout. Right-side elements (stats, collection icons, tag buttons) stay fixed-width regardless of N-panel resizing.
  21. Variant Stats Split Style: Product and Part stat displays split into separate dimmed icon + full-brightness number elements. Icons use active=False while numbers remain at default brightness.
  22. Collection Icon Rightmost Position: Collection assignment icons on Product and Part rows moved to the rightmost position in the fixed right column, separated from stats by a visual gap.
  23. Pool Index in Fixed Column: Part pool index field moved into the fixed right column to prevent stretching with panel width.
  24. State Tag Fixed Column: State row tag button moved from the flexible left row into a dedicated fixed-width right column (1.0 units).
  25. Recursive Object Count: Part row object counter now counts objects recursively through child collections instead of only direct children.
  26. Part Object Counter Always Zero: Object count on Part rows used len(part.collection.objects) which only counted direct collection members. Replaced with recursive traversal that includes all child collection objects.
  27. Outliner Visibility Not Snapping to Rest State: Objects with visibility properties (hide_viewport, hide_render) keyed in the Rest Action but without a matching slot in the current VL's cascade action were never ref-snapped on VL switch. The fast-path slot filter in _apply_action_to_watched skipped these objects before step 4's ref-snap loop. Added apply_rest_values call at the fast-path filter exit point. Also added step 4b to walk collection instances and ref-snap source objects that live outside the active scene.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Inline VL Preview Thumbnails: New inline preview thumbnail system showing rendered output images directly in the tree view next to each View Layer name. Thumbnail size selectable via settings popover (24/32/40 px). template_icon drives UIList row height; tree lines scale individually; all other elements center naturally. Preview resolution priority: final rendered output (via SmartSyntaxEngine) → viewport snapshot (tks_previews/).
  2. Render All Previews Operator (tks.render_all_previews): Modal operator that iterates all Scene/VL pairs, switches context, captures a clean viewport snapshot (128×128, overlays disabled), and saves to tks_previews/ next to the blend file. Auto-detects Cycles RENDERED viewport mode and switches to render.render() with 16 samples + denoising to avoid blank thumbnails.
  3. Viewport Preview via Batch Renderer: The "Viewport" button in preview settings now invokes tks.batch_render with preview_mode=True, using render.opengl() for synchronous shading-aware captures. Renders respect the active viewport shading mode (Solid, Material Preview, Rendered). The render window is shown to the user during foreground renders.
  4. Preview Cascade Overrides: Preview renders now resolve and apply per-VL Camera, World, and Variant Switch cascade overrides before each capture, matching the full batch render behavior. Previously previews only set resolution/format settings.
  5. Per-VL Preview Icon Refresh: Each VL's tree view thumbnail refreshes immediately after its preview is saved via invalidate() + signal_redraw(), rather than waiting for the entire batch to complete.
  6. Tree View Render Order: Preview renders now follow the tree view order (top-to-bottom as the user sees them in tks_all_viewlayers) instead of native Blender scene/VL iteration order.
  7. Preview Placeholder Icon: VLs without a rendered preview now show a placeholder icon (bundled placeholder.png) instead of a blank space. The placeholder loads once and is cached until replaced by an actual render.
  8. Background Preview Render (tks.render_all_previews_bg): Renders preview thumbnails in headless background subprocesses so Blender stays fully interactive. Tree refreshes progressively as each VL completes. Reuses the BGRenderManager subprocess pattern with Cycles GPU workaround.
  9. Refresh All Previews Operator (tks.refresh_all_previews): Clears the entire preview cache so thumbnails lazy-reload from disk on next draw, respecting the priority order.
  10. Preview Toggle in Settings: tks_show_preview BoolProperty on WindowManager toggles inline preview visibility. tks_preview_size EnumProperty selects thumbnail size (24/32/40 px).
  11. force_sync_inspector() API: New synchronous refresh function in inspector/sync.py for operators (Delete Slot, Clean Actions) and VL switch to bypass the 0.2s background timer and provide instant UI updates.
  12. Automated Test Suite: Five new test files under dev/tests/ — test_mutation_lock.py, test_preset_dirty.py, test_rest_state.py, test_registration.py, test_undo_safety.py — with pytest configuration (conftest.py, pytest.ini, run_tests.py).
