  13. Dev Maintenance Tooling: New developer scripts — check_duplicates.py, strip_dead_code.py, strip_dead_code_2.py, update_to_5.1.py, extract_popovers.py/.ps1, run_all_stats.ps1, append.ps1.
  14. Architecture Documentation: New docs — doc/architecture/data_models.md, doc/architecture/foundation.md, doc/architecture/separation_of_concerns.md, doc/design/inspector_pin_logic.md, doc/refactoring_roadmap.md, doc/testing/edge_case_matrix.md, doc/troubleshooting/_template.md, doc/audit_report.md.
  15. Phase 6 Roadmap (VL Previews): Added Phase 6 planning to doc/ROADMAP.md documenting the preview feature scope and future enhancements.
  16. .gitignore Updates: Added gitignore rules for dev artifacts and generated files.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Operator Relocation Refactor (134 files, +8330/−4907 lines): Relocated all generic operator files from panels/ to operators/ for clean separation of concerns. New operator modules:
  2. operators/cascade/ — Action, Camera, Compositor, World, Variant, Manage popover operators (moved from panels/popovers_cascade/)
  3. operators/context/ — CRUD, shortcuts, versions, groups (moved from panels/context_operators/)
  4. operators/inspector/ — Watchlist, popovers, keyframe operators (moved from panels/inspector/operators.py)
  5. operators/tags/ — Tag library and tag group operators (extracted from panels/tag_library_ui.py and panels/tag_group_ops.py)
  6. operators/misc/ — Menus, output rules, settings operators (moved from panels/popovers_misc/)
  7. operators/ui/ — Globals, navigation, pie menu operators (extracted from panels/globals_panel.py, panels/navigation.py)
  8. Cascade apply_overrides() Signature: Removed obsolete context parameter — function now takes (view_layer, scene) directly. Updated all call sites including tag library preset change handler.
  9. Data Sub-Target Slot Naming: Fresh action processing now resolves slot names for LIGHT, CAMERA, MESH, CURVE, ARMATURE, LATTICE, METABALL, and KEY data sub-targets by finding the owning object and using generate_slot_name(slot_type='DATA', ...). Previously only NODETREE sub-targets had proper slot name resolution.
  10. Hardened Unregistration: All property deletion in tag_library.py, vl_preview/__init__.py, and feature __init__.py files now wrapped in try/except (AttributeError, RuntimeError) to prevent crashes during Blender shutdown or rapid addon toggle.
  11. Tag Library Property Cleanup: Unregistration of tks_assigned_tag, tks_output_rule, and tks_tag_library properties on Scene, ViewLayer, and World now fault-tolerant.
  12. Scene Node Tree Safety: _handle_viewport_selection_sync now uses getattr(scene, 'node_tree', None) and getattr(scene, 'use_nodes', False) instead of direct attribute access, preventing AttributeError on scenes without compositor.
  13. Cascade Self-Merge Guard: Fresh action processing now skips merge when the queued action IS the cascade action (happens when depsgraph fires after cascade assignment).
  14. Architectural Fortification: Added audit report documenting architectural patterns, consolidation targets, and operator/panel dependency graph.
  15. Preview Priority Order: _resolve_preview_path now checks final rendered output FIRST (via resolve_render_path + SmartSyntaxEngine), falling back to viewport snapshots only when no final render exists.
  16. Tag Library Package Split: Split monolithic panels/tag_library_ui.py into a panels/tag_library_ui/ package with __init__.py, draw.py, and sync.py. Zero logic changes — all external imports remain compatible via __init__.py re-exports.
  17. Channels Package Split: Split monolithic panels/channels.py (1261 lines) into panels/channels/ package with logic.py, draw.py, sections.py, and __init__.py. Backward-compatible re-exports for draw_channels and draw_channels_full.
  18. Navigation Package Split: Split monolithic panels/navigation.py (1840 lines) into panels/navigation/ package with panel.py, warnings.py, monitors.py, logic.py, and __init__.py. Backward-compatible re-exports for _get_slot_mismatches.
  19. Tree Draw O(N²) Elimination: Added parent_vl_name StringProperty to TKS_AllViewLayerItem, populated during sync. Replaced the O(N) backward _find_parent_vl_name scan and O(N²) filter_items tag filter with 4 pre-computed sets built once per draw. VL_GROUP tag gray-out uses O(1) _vlg_cache dict lookup instead of per-row get_vl_groups() calls.
  20. Batch Render Queue Tree Order: Render queue UI (context_render_queue.py) and BG task builder (operators.py) now use wm.tks_all_viewlayers tree view order instead of native bpy.data.scenes order, matching the foreground renderer.
  21. CLI Worker Cascade Unification: Background render CLI worker now uses core.cascade.apply_overrides for action resolution instead of divergent custom logic. Lightweight inline unassign replaces heavy _unassign_all_actions for headless performance.
  22. Core Package Consolidation: Removed core_minimal/ and core_animation/ wrapper packages. All modules (cascade.py, constants.py, mutation_queue.py, naming_utils.py, variant_queries.py, vl_handlers.py, vl_persistence.py, vl_targets.py, anim_utils.py) are now imported directly from their canonical locations. Updated 70+ import references across the codebase.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Light Slot Override & Keyframe Destruction: Cascade actions from other View Layers were overriding light property slots, destroying keyframes set via the "Animate property" diamond icon. Non-Object fresh action handler continued processing cascade actions despite use_fake_user=True. merge_action_into_cascade was destroying keyframes on self-merge.
  2. Unregistration bl_rna Exceptions: Secured all addon class unregistration loops against ReferenceError / AttributeError when bl_rna is already invalidated during Blender shutdown or rapid addon toggle.
  3. Preview Cache Bypass: "Render All Previews" was directly loading viewport snapshots into the preview collection cache (pcoll.load()), completely bypassing the priority resolution in _resolve_preview_path. Fixed by removing the direct cache pre-load.
  4. Cascade Camera Popover Import Fix: Fixed import path in ops_camera.py after operator relocation.
  5. Cascade World Popover Import Fix: Fixed import path in ops_world.py after operator relocation.
  6. Preview Camera Not Switching: Preview renders were always rendering the same camera because _phase_4_preview did not apply cascade overrides. Added Camera, World, and Variant Switch cascade resolution to _phase_4_preview.
  7. Preset Cascade Sync TypeError: Fixed sync_preset_cascade calling get_cascade_winner with incorrect global_prop_name format, causing a TypeError when saving render tier presets.
  8. Rest Default Slot Matching: "Set as Rest Default" operator orphaned existing keyframes because cascade renames slot.name_display to token labels, so manual name lookup created duplicate empty slots. Now lets Blender auto-match the correct slot after action assignment, with find_or_create_slot as fallback only.
  9. Rest State Keyframe Loss on VL Switch: Switching View Layers destroyed keyframes inside the Rest_State action. Three independent destructive paths were identified and guarded: (a) _process_fresh_actions in inspector/handlers.py was merging fresh actions into the rest action — now skips when target is Rest_State; (b) _apply_action_to_watched in cascade.py renamed slot name_display to cascade token labels — now uses protect_slots=True to preserve original slot names; (c) _auto_rename_slots in vl_handlers.py ran after cascade apply and renamed ref action slots to expected cascade labels — now skips targets whose action is Rest_State.

docs.title: Removed
docs.text:
1. Dead Code (cascade_auto_pin.py): Removed unused auto-pin cascade module from dead_code/.
  2. Pie Menu Inline Code (panels/pie_menus/channels.py): Extracted to operators/ui/ops_pie_menus.py.
  3. Tag Group Operators Inline (panels/tag_group_ops.py): Extracted to operators/tags/ops_groups.py.
  4. Inspector Operators Inline (panels/inspector/operators.py): Extracted to operators/inspector/ subpackage.
  5. Generic List Actions (utils/ops_generic_list.py): Removed 241-line generic UIList action utility. List operations now handled by dedicated per-feature operators.
  6. Core Wrapper Packages: Removed core_minimal/ (8 modules) and core_animation/ (1 module) indirection layers. Imports now reference canonical module locations directly.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Signal-Based Redraw System (signal_redraw): Replaced scattered tag_redraw() and timer-based UI refresh calls with a centralized signal_redraw() function. All panels and operators now request redraws through a single entry point, preventing duplicate region invalidations and providing consistent throttling.
  2. Debug Monitor UI: New collapsible panel in the navigation sidebar showing live debug log output. Includes a UIList (TKS_UL_DebugLog) with filterable log entries, topic/subtopic color coding, and configurable max-lines. Log reader utility (utils/log_reader.py) parses the daily log file and feeds entries to the UI.
  3. Debug Monitor Settings Popover: Configurable heartbeat interval, max entry count, and log level filter accessible from the debug monitor panel header.
  4. Auto-Expand VL on Version Creation: Creating a new VL Version now automatically expands the parent View Layer in the tree, making the new version immediately visible.
  5. Auto-Select New VL Version: The newly created VL Version is automatically selected in the tree after creation, so the user's focus stays on the new item.
  6. Comprehensive Scene Deduplication: ensure_default_groups now performs cross-group scene deduplication — a scene can only exist in exactly one group. Previously only cleaned duplicates from the "Ungrouped" group; now scans all groups and keeps the first occurrence.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. New VL Version Always Active: Every new VL Version is immediately activated on creation. All existing versions are deactivated first, and active_index is set to the new version. Previously only the first version was activated.
  2. Process Monitor Category Filter: Process monitor sidebar filter buttons (All, Core, Features, Inspector, UI) improved with consistent layout and proper filter state persistence.
  3. Process Monitor Sidebar Layout: Settings button and restart-dead button moved into a cleaner sidebar arrangement matching the tree panel pattern.
  4. Tree Design Settings Panel: Tree visibility/design settings wrapped in a collapsible sub-panel within the settings popover for a cleaner UI hierarchy.
  5. Codebase Quality Cleanup: Replaced inefficient O(N) list lookups with O(1) dict/set lookups across multiple files. Removed stale TODO/FIXME comments. Fixed bad relative imports in context operators.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Non-Object JIT Merge — Ghost Actions: Cascade actions from other ViewLayers were falsely detected as "fresh" on non-Object datablocks (Scene, World, Material, NodeTree). Replaced O(N) tier iteration with O(1) use_fake_user check — cascade actions always have use_fake_user=True, Blender-autokeyed fresh actions don't.
  2. Non-Object JIT Merge — Node Tree Disambiguation: All material/world/light/scene node trees share the name 'Shader Nodetree'. The merge path found the wrong node tree (world's instead of material's). Fixed by storing the owning datablock (nt_owner_type + nt_owner_name) during detection via _id.original.as_pointer() and resolving node trees through their owner in the merge path.
  3. Non-Object JIT Merge — Depsgraph Evaluated Copies: update.id in depsgraph_update_post is the evaluated copy, not the original. Pointer comparisons using _id.as_pointer() never matched originals in bpy.data.*. Fixed by using _id.original.as_pointer().
  4. Non-Object JIT Merge — Slot Name Mismatch: Node tree merge used the literal name 'Shader Nodetree' as slot name, but the token system expects <OwnerName>_Nodes (e.g., Aluminium_green_Nodes). Fixed to compute slot names matching the token convention.
  5. Non-Object JIT Merge — Missing Auto-Assign: Keyframing non-Object datablocks (World, Material, Scene, NodeTree) on a VL without an existing cascade action silently dropped the fresh action. Added cascade action auto-creation and tier assignment (VLVersion → ViewLayer → Scene) for non-Object datablocks, matching the existing Object needs_cascade path.
  6. Missing except Clauses: Restored except blocks in slots.py, preset_engine.py, and rest_state/operators.py that were accidentally removed during the lost work recovery (git restore .).
  7. Lost Work Recovery: Reconstructed signal_redraw consolidation, debug monitor implementation, and all uncommitted code changes that were wiped by git restore . on March 16.
  8. Sub-Data Icons in Watchlist: Fixed tks.subdata_popover operator not being properly registered, causing crashes when drawing sub-data icons in the Inspector watchlist compact mode.
  9. Tree Refresh After Settings Change: Tree list no longer fails to refresh when toggling visibility settings. Fixed stale cache tokens and forced sync after settings popover changes.
  10. Tree Refresh After Grouping/Ungrouping: Scene expansion state is now correctly preserved after grouping or ungrouping scenes and VLs. Fixed sync logic to restore is_expanded flags after collection rebuild.
  11. Empty scene_name on Group Members: Fixed operators that created scene group members without setting scene_name, causing scenes to silently disappear from the tree. Added migration to recover empty scene_name from PointerProperty backups.
  12. Scene Move Operators: Fixed scene move up/down operators that failed silently when scene_name was empty on group members.
  13. Debug Monitor Performance: Fixed debug monitor timer firing too frequently and consuming excessive CPU by adding heartbeat-based throttling and lazy log file reads.
  14. Process Monitor List Filter: Fixed process monitor UIList filter that incorrectly hid processes when switching between category tabs.
  15. Process Monitor Deductions: Fixed process monitor heartbeat age calculation that produced negative values for newly registered processes.
  16. Missing poll() False Positives: Triaged and fixed genuine missing poll() methods on operators that needed context guards. Dismissed false positives where poll() was intentionally omitted (e.g., operators only invoked from validated UI paths).
  17. Level Filter in Debug Logging: Fixed log level filter not being applied when reading log entries, causing all levels to show regardless of the selected filter.
  18. VL Chevron Gap: Removed the 0.6 ui_units depth gap (VL_UG_DEPTH_GAP) between the expand chevron and the VL selector icon for ungrouped View Layers, eliminating the visible spacing.
  19. Duplicate Scenes in Tree: Scenes could appear multiple times in the tree if they existed in both a named group and Ungrouped simultaneously. Data-level dedup in ensure_default_groups now prevents this, backed by the existing display-level seen_scenes guard in sync_all_viewlayers.
  20. Rest State Snap-Back Flashing: Unkeyed objects snapped back to rest state immediately after being transformed, making them impossible to move. Root cause was twofold: (a) cascade step 4 ref snapping fired on every apply_overrides call (depsgraph updates, property changes) instead of only on VL switches — fixed by adding a snap_ref gate that defaults to False and is only set to True from VL-switch, file-load, undo, and redo call paths; (b) _deferred_autosnap in navigation.py ran a panel-draw feedback loop that detected drifted properties and auto-snapped them back every ~0.5s — disabled this path since ref snapping is now handled correctly by cascade step 4.
  21. Deferred VL Switch Missing Rest Snap: The deferred VL-switch handler in ops_crud.py (used when clicking VLs in the tree) called apply_overrides without snap_ref=True, causing step 4 ref snapping to silently skip. Objects kept rest-state transforms instead of evaluating their keyed action values.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Channels Pie Menu: New pie menu (panels/pie_menus/channels.py) accessible via hotkey to quickly inspect and modify channel properties. Uses inline drawing logic with use_property_decorate = True for keyframe diamond visibility, bypassing Blender's C-managed Panel layout limitations in popup contexts.
  2. Inspector Dirty Flag Optimization: _inspector_dirty flag in inspector/handlers.py gates the expensive O(N) scene iteration in _sync_timer. The depsgraph handler only sets the flag on structural changes (Scene, Collection, or Objects with animation_data), not on pure transform ticks — eliminating 30-60 wasted syncs/sec during viewport interaction.
  3. mark_inspector_dirty() API: New public function for operators to signal the sync timer to refresh watchlist/actions/slots on the next tick, even when no depsgraph update fires.
  4. Undo/Redo Generation Counter: _undo_redo_generation counter in vl_handlers.py prevents stale flag-clear timers from killing active redo guards. Each undo_pre/redo_pre increments the counter; deferred clear timers abort if the generation has moved on.
  5. Per-VL Pinning Scope (utils/pinned.py): Pinned object registry now tracks objects per View Layer. Switching VLs preserves each layer's independent pin set. New functions: get_pinned_for_vl(), set_pinned_for_vl(), clear_pins_for_vl().
  6. Group Creation with Auto-Selection: TKS_OT_CreateSceneGroup and TKS_OT_CreateVLGroup in ops_create.py now auto-select the newly created group row in the tree after creation, preventing the user from losing focus.
  7. Cascade Popover Debug Logging: _helpers.py in popovers_cascade/ now includes guarded tks_log calls for cascade resolution and assignment diagnostics.
  8. Preset Engine TTL Cache: preset_engine.py now uses @lru_cache with TTL-based invalidation for hot-path preset lookups, reducing redundant file I/O during draws.
  9. Batch Render Output Properties: features/batch_render/properties.py extended with additional render output property definitions.
  10. Undo Corruption Vector Documentation: Created a comprehensive troubleshooting guide (doc/troubleshooting/undo_mutation_vectors.md) that catalogs all 7 interactions between Blender's native Undo/Redo operations and the addon's background automation, explaining the risks and safeguards for each.
  11. VL Undo Step-by-Step: View Layer switches are now independent undo steps. Each VL switch pushes a real Blender undo step via bl_options={'UNDO'} on TKS_OT_SwitchViewLayer. Scene IDProperty tks_undo_active_vl tracks the active VL name inside the undo stack. Ctrl+Z undoes individual VL switches without affecting other scene modifications.
  12. VL Undo State Persistence: tks_undo_active_vl is baked into .blend files via _save_pre_handler, ensuring the initial undo state always has the correct VL name.
  13. Process Monitor (utils/process_monitor.py): Runtime observability system that tracks all addon background processes (timers, handlers, watchers). Each process registers with name, kind, category, module, and expected heartbeat interval. Includes heartbeat age tracking, dead process detection, and automatic restart for failed timers.
  14. Process Monitor UI: New collapsible panel in the navigation bar showing all registered addon processes. UIList (TKS_UL_ProcessMonitor) with status icons (alive/warning/dead), category filter buttons (All, Core, Features, Inspector, UI), settings popover with heartbeat interval control, and "Restart Dead" operator for one-click recovery.
  15. Process Monitor PropertyGroup & Collection: TKS_ProcessMonitorItem PropertyGroup on WindowManager for live UI sync. sync_pm_collection() mirrors the runtime registry to Blender's RNA layer.
  16. Inspector Managed/Pinned System: Replaced the old Add/Remove watchlist model with a two-state system — Managed (follows cascade, auto-detected) and Pinned (exempt from cascade, user-controlled). Pin icon on each watchlist row toggles between states.
  17. Pin Operator (TKS_OT_TogglePin): Dedicated operator with confirmation dialog for unpinning objects that have actions. Supports alt+click for pinned objects only.
  18. Unassign Action Operator (TKS_OT_UnassignAction): Clears manual action override and restores cascade action on an object.
  19. Clear Slot / Clear Action Operators: TKS_OT_ClearSlot and TKS_OT_ClearAction in the inspector popovers for explicit slot/action management on pinned objects.
  20. Save-Pre Handler (vl_handlers.py): New save_pre handler registered at addon load to perform cleanup tasks before file save.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Debug Logging Disabled by Default: enable_debug_logging in addon preferences now defaults to False. End users won't generate log files unless they explicitly opt in.
  2. Autosave Preferences Enabled by Default: autosave_preferences in addon preferences now defaults to True. User settings persist automatically without requiring manual save.
  3. Documentation Button URL: The ? help button in the navigation bar now opens the correct GitHub repository (https://github.com/niwo-dev/Takes-for-Blender) instead of a placeholder URL.
  4. Channels Pie Menu Inline Drawing: Replaced fake Panel __new__ hack in draw_channels_full() with direct inline drawing logic. Fixes property values and keyframe diamonds not displaying in popup contexts.
  5. Preferences UI Layout: preferences/ui_draw.py updated with improved debug logging topic layout, section headers, and expanded preference categories.
  6. Addon Preferences Expanded: addon_prefs.py adds new BoolProperties for granular debug topic control and updates existing property defaults and descriptions.
  7. Inspector Watchlist Rebuild: sync.py overhauled with new managed/pinned state tracking, auto-detection of objects with non-cascade actions, and improved rebuild logic.
  8. Inspector UIList Pin Column: ui_lists.py updated with inline _draw_pin function rendering pin/unpin icons per row with proper state visualization.
  9. Inspector Panel Header: Panel header updated to reflect managed/pinned terminology.
  10. Cascade Pinned Object Skipping: cascade.py step 4 (ref state snap) now skips pinned objects — they are exempt from cascade-driven snapping.
  11. Context Panel Handlers: Added handler registration in panels/context/handlers.py and __init__.py for improved context panel lifecycle management.
  12. Tree Sync & Draw Optimization: context/sync.py, draw_tree.py, draw_layers.py, and tree_list.py updated with improved sync logic, scene/VL re-targeting, and draw guard conditions.
  13. Groups PropertyGroup: properties/groups.py extended with additional group member tracking and helper functions.
  14. UI Styles Refresh: ui/styles.py updated with revised style definitions.
  15. _unassign_all_actions Target-Aware: cascade.py now accepts an optional target_action parameter — sub-targets already assigned to the cascade action are no longer unnecessarily cleared, preventing action data loss during VL switches.
  16. Output Mode Toggle Simplified: TKS_OT_ToggleOutputMode in ops_smart_output.py uses clean exclusive-switch logic when unlinked instead of the previous complex conditional branches.
  17. Inspector Selection Sync Safety: _on_objects_index_changed in inspector/handlers.py now checks obj.name in context.view_layer.objects before selection, and wraps select_set() / active assignment in try/except RuntimeError to prevent crashes with hidden or restricted objects.
  18. Guarded Inspector Logging: _handle_viewport_selection_sync wraps the obj_updates list comprehension behind tks_log_active('CORE', 'CASCADE') to avoid building the list when logging is disabled.
  19. blender_manifest.toml Removed: Manifest file removed from version control.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Fast Redo Losing Checkpoint: _deferred_cascade_apply no longer sets is_undoing = True at the top of the function, which was blocking _apply_action_to_watched from executing during redo. Redo path now clears both flags BEFORE calling apply_overrides, and applies variant cascade so redo fully restores state.
  2. Stale Undo/Redo Flag-Clear Timers: Added _undo_redo_generation counter — deferred flag-clear timers now check the generation before clearing, preventing a stale timer from clearing flags set by a newer undo/redo that arrived during the delay window.
  3. Tree Move Item Selection Loss: All 5 move cases (Scene Group, VL Group, Scene, VL, VL Version) in TKS_OT_MoveAllViewLayerItem now use wm.tks_all_viewlayers_index = i (RNA property access) instead of wm['tks_all_viewlayers_index'] = i (IDProperty). IDProperty writes were silently failing to trigger UI updates, so the moved item appeared deselected after reordering.
  4. Group Creation Without Selection: Scene Group and VL Group create operators now set the tree selection index to the new group's row after creation and rebuild, so the user immediately sees the new group selected.
  5. _unassign_all_actions Over-Clearing: Sub-targets (materials, node trees, world, scene) whose action already matches the target cascade action are no longer cleared. This prevented unnecessary action deletion during VL switches that caused keyframe data loss.
  6. Inspector Objects List Crash: Clicking an object in the inspector list that was hidden or excluded from the view layer no longer crashes with RuntimeError. Added obj.name in context.view_layer.objects pre-check and try/except guard.
  7. "Split-Second" Undo Corruption Trap: Resolved a critical race condition where users hitting Undo simultaneously with background timer callbacks would corrupt Blender's native undo cache and orphan FCurves.
  8. Global Undo Abort Guards: Added strict TKS_VL_STATE.is_undoing and is_redoing abort checks to every major data-mutating timer in the addon, including:
  9. The Cascade Auto-Assigner (apply_overrides, _apply_action_to_watched)
  10. The ViewLayer Action Cleanser (_unassign_all_actions)
  11. The Autokey Merge Engine (_process_fresh_actions)
  12. Rest State "Snap-Back" (_deferred_snap)
  13. Auto-Snap on Drift Detection (_deferred_autosnap)
  14. The Coalesced Mutation Queue (_process_mutation_queue)
  15. The Deferred Cascade Applier (_deferred_cascade_apply)
  16. Phantom Viewport Popping Avoidance: Objects no longer randomly snap to their frame 0 Rest State or snap back to their pre-transform position midway through a rapid series of undo strokes.
  17. VL Undo Confusion: Replaced Python-side undo/redo stack with Blender-native Scene property approach. VL switches were previously consumed simultaneously with other undo steps instead of being independent.
  18. Camera Cascade Stale State: When no camera is resolved from any cascade level (VL Version → VL → VL Group → Scene → Scene Group → Global), scene.camera is now cleared to None. Previously, the last assigned camera persisted across VL switches even when the target VL had no camera assigned.
  19. Pin Execution Order Race Condition: Pinning now sets the pin flag BEFORE clearing the cascade action. Previously, clearing first triggered cascade handlers that re-applied the action before the pin flag was set.
  20. Pin Action Clearing: Pinning an object now correctly clears its cascade action, giving the user a blank slate.
  21. Pin Rest State Snap: After pinning, the object snaps to Rest State rest pose. Uses apply_rest_values with no target action filter so ALL ref properties are applied unconditionally — the object is fully detaching from cascade.
  22. Unpin Cascade Re-application: Unpinning correctly clears action/slot, then re-applies the cascade via apply_overrides.
  23. Unpin Confirmation Consistency: Confirmation dialog now fires reliably whenever the unpinned object has an action.
  24. Alt+Click Restricted to Pinned Objects: Alt+click action assignment in the watchlist limited to already-pinned objects only.
  25. Auto-Pin for Different Actions: Objects with an action differing from the cascade action are automatically marked as pinned.
  26. Undo Step Bloat & Redo Corruption: Implemented a global Coalesced Mutation Queue (enqueue_mutation). All background data mutations (JIT F-Curve merges, slot creation, fresh action processing) are now dynamically batched into a single execution window outside of read-only depsgraph handlers. This successfully consolidates dozens of reactive macro-mutations into a single Blender undo step, and prevents the "Redo Broken" issue caused by isolated timers firing out of phase.
  27. Depsgraph Handler Undo Guard: tks_action setter on View Layer now skips propagation when is_undoing/is_redoing is active, preventing cascade re-application during undo that would corrupt the undo stack.
  28. Cascade Popover Slot/Action Guards: ops_action.py, ops_camera.py, and ops_world.py cascade popovers include additional None-safety guards for action/slot lookups.

docs.title: Planned
docs.text: 1. Auto-Rename Datablocks: Keep naming of actions, camera data, and other datatypes updated when user changes object name, view layer name, or scene name. Cascade string references should heal automatically.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Variant Tag Category & Popover: New "Variant" tag category auto-created on load. Variant tree items show a tag popover button matching the takes tree tag pattern.
  2. Variant Tree Line Tag Color: Variant tree lines inherit tag color from assigned tags, matching the takes tree coloring pattern.
  3. Tag Reorder (Up/Down): Tags can be reordered within their category using up/down arrows in the tag tree sidebar.
  4. {variant_tag} Smart Output Token: New {variant_tag} token resolves the active variant's tag name in Smart Output paths and the token cheat sheet.
  5. {product} Token Added: Added missing {product} token to both the token sheet and cheat sheet.
  6. Preset Change Automation Modes: New automation mode selector in Addon Preferences → Features. Controls whether preset changes are auto-accepted, auto-synced, or require manual confirmation.
  7. 3-Button Preset Pattern (Accept / Revert / Accept & Sync): Preset dirty state now shows three action buttons — Accept (save local changes), Revert (discard changes), and Accept & Sync (save and propagate to all tiers). Alt+Click on Accept triggers sync.
  8. Tier-Aware Preset Selection: Preset dropdowns now show [Tier] suffix (e.g., [Addon], [User]) so users can distinguish built-in from user-created presets.
  9. Smart Output Filepath Dimming: Blender's native render.filepath field is grayed out when Smart Output is enabled, preventing confusion between the two output path systems.
  10. Save as Default (Tree Visibility): New "Save as Default" button in the tree visibility popover persists the current visibility/color settings as the startup default.
  11. Pin Outside Collapse Limit: Addon Preferences now enforces and shows the maximum number of icons that can be pinned outside the cascade collapse threshold, with an info icon at the limit.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Takes Panel Header Icon: Panel header now uses OUTLINER tree icon instead of the previous icon.
  2. Tree Visibility Popover Layout: Popover sections wrapped in boxes with improved alignment — 50% split rows, right-aligned labels, shortened color picker labels, and floppy-disc icon for Save as Default.
  3. Preset Tooltips Rewritten: All preset button tooltips rewritten for end-user clarity (removed developer-facing language).
  4. Preferences Window Reuse: Opening addon preferences from the panel now reuses the existing preferences window instead of opening a duplicate.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Preset Tier Key Decoding: Tier-qualified preset keys (e.g., [User]MyPreset) were not decoded before file lookup, causing presets saved with tier suffixes to be invisible.
  2. Fileoutput Preset Discovery: load_preset_cached only searched the ADDON tier — user-created fileoutput presets were invisible. Now searches all tiers.
  3. Fileoutput Preset UI Duplication: Fileoutput preset row appeared twice when both smart output and standard output were enabled. Fixed deduplication in panel draw.
  4. Smart Output Dirty False Positive: render.filepath changes were incorrectly flagged as dirty on the render preset instead of the fileoutput preset.
  5. Batch Render ACTION Cascade: Added missing ACTION cascade resolution to batch render Phase 4 — actions were not being applied per-VL during batch renders.
  6. Preset JSON Auto-Upgrade: Preset JSON files with missing properties (from older versions) now auto-fill defaults instead of crashing on load.
  7. Batch Render Freeze (INVOKE ↔ EXEC): Reverted to INVOKE_DEFAULT with temp_override after EXEC_DEFAULT blocked the render window in foreground mode.
  8. Storage Tier Order: Reversed STORAGE_TIERS so user presets save to the USER tier by default instead of the ADDON tier.
  9. Panel Prepend Registration: draw_prepend registrations didn't fire when the panel's draw() was replaced by an override. Merged prepend logic into the draw override.
  10. Pool Material Selector: Replaced shield + user-count material selector with prop_search for pool materials, matching standard Blender patterns.
  11. Variant Tag Button Pattern: Variant tag button now matches takes tree pattern — grayed when unassigned, uses TAG icon.
  12. Tag Full-Width Names: Tag names in the tag tree now use full available width (removed unnecessary LEFT alignment).
  13. Action Rename Warning on Manual Assign: Actions manually assigned in the takes tree no longer trigger the rename warning when auto_rename_actions is disabled — non-token names are intentional.
  14. Watchlist Warning on Manual Override: Objects with a tks_action per-object override no longer show a false action mismatch warning in the Inspector watchlist.
  15. Foreground Render Progress Stuck at 0%: use_lock_interface blocked modal timer events, preventing progress updates. Removed in favor of existing _batch_render_in_progress guard + added throttled UI redraws.
  16. Closing Render Window Continues Batch: Closing the render display window (X) between tasks now cancels the entire batch instead of continuing to the next View Layer.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Tag Grouping System: Tags can now be organized into collapsible groups within categories. Ctrl+G creates a group instantly (no dialog, matching takes tree pattern). Alt+G ungroups. Groups have their own expand/collapse chevrons, tree lines, folder icons, and full CRUD (create, rename, delete, dissolve). Tags within groups are fully supported across all cascade tiers including preset assignment, render output rules, and variant tag filtering.
  2. Context-Aware Ctrl+N Shortcut: Ctrl+N now opens different menus depending on the active panel — Add Tag menu in the tag library, Add VL menu in the takes tree.
  3. Tag Add Menu: The + button in the tag library is now a dropdown menu with "Add Tag" and "Add Group" options, matching the takes tree pattern.
  4. Tag Delete Confirmation: DEL/X hotkeys now prompt a confirmation dialog before removing tags, matching the takes tree safety pattern.
  5. Handler Suppression During Batch Render: New suppress_addon_handlers() / restore_addon_handlers() in utils/state.py physically removes all addon depsgraph_update_post handlers during batch renders (except the settle observer). Guarantees zero interference instead of relying on per-handler flag checks.
  6. Background Batch Render Operator (TKS_OT_BatchRenderBG): New operator renders all enabled View Layers in background Blender subprocesses via cli_worker.py. Blender stays fully interactive during renders — no modal lock. Managed by a singleton BGRenderManager process manager.
  7. Background Render CLI Worker (cli_worker.py): Headless CLI script for background rendering. Resolves [blend] token and // relative paths before apply_render_overrides, then saves via bpy.data.images['Render Result'].save_render() to bypass Blender's C-level path auto-relativization.
  8. Background Render Process Manager (process_manager.py): Subprocess manager with threaded stdout reader using queue.Queue. The poll() method drains the queue non-blockingly via get_nowait(), preventing Blender from freezing.
  9. Dual-Mode Render Sidebar: Render queue sidebar now shows two buttons — foreground (OUTPUT icon) and background (DESKTOP icon) — giving users explicit control over render mode.
  10. Render Queue Status Expansion: Added SAVING (amber) and CANCELLED (muted orange) statuses alongside existing Pending, Rendering, Done, and Failed. render_write_handler now accurately marks VLs as DONE only after the file is written to disk. Remaining queued VLs are marked CANCELLED on abort.
  11. Per-VL Fail Reason Tooltip: New tks_render_fail_reason StringProperty on ViewLayer stores failure details. Failed items in the render queue show an error tooltip with the reason via TKS_OT_RQStatTooltip.
  12. Render Completion Sound Preferences: New batch_render_sound EnumProperty with 7 options — None, Asterisk, Exclamation, Critical Stop, Question, Default Beep, or Custom File (.wav). Custom file path field appears when "Custom File" is selected. Sound plays automatically when background render finishes.
  13. Sound Preview Button: Play button next to the sound dropdown in Preferences → Features to audition the selected notification sound. Grayed out when sound is disabled.
  14. Inspector Channel Search (ClearInspectorSearch): Added search/clear functionality to the inspector channel list.
  15. Render Output Mode Selector: New Standard 🔗 Compositor toggle bar below the Smart Output toggle. Controls which outputs the batch render writes — standard output, compositor File Output nodes, or both. Follows the Context + Link + Inspector button pattern with linked/exclusive toggle behavior. Per-scene setting, stored in fileoutput presets. Integrated into both foreground and background batch render operators.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Tag Library Tree Line Alignment: Group chevrons, folder icons, tree lines, and color swatches now align consistently with the takes tree indentation pattern. Gap added between tree lines and color swatches for visual clarity.
  2. Tag Sidebar Button Visibility: Sidebar action buttons (move up/down, rename, delete) in the tag tree are always visible but dimmed when not applicable, matching the takes tree grayout pattern with proper can_move_up/can_move_down boundary checks.
  3. Category Header Styling: Category headers use dimmed row.active = False with only the icon dimmed (not the name text), matching compact header treatment.
  4. Globals Panel Layout: Updated globals panel with improved layout and organization.
  5. Render Queue UI: Progress bars now always visible for every VL (not just during render). Shows status-appropriate text — "Pending", percentage, "Saving", "Done", "Failed" with tooltip, or "Cancelled". Stats header counts all 5 statuses with user-customizable color dots.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Background Render Output Path: Renders were saved to the temporary .tks_bg_render_tmp directory instead of the intended output path. Root cause: Blender's C-level code auto-relativized absolute paths when they shared a parent directory with the blend file. Fixed by removing write_still=True and manually saving via save_render().
  2. Background Render Freezing Blender: The modal timer's stdout.readline() blocked the main thread while waiting for subprocess output. Replaced with threaded reader pattern.
  3. Background Render UI Redraws: Progress percentage only updated when moving the mouse. Throttled redraws to once per second across all windows and areas.
  4. Tag Group Delete vs Tag Delete: Pressing remove on a group header was deleting the tag instead of the group. Fixed operator routing to correctly call group_delete for group headers.
  5. Corrupted sync_tag_tree: Restored corrupted tag tree sync function and fixed group_delete call signature (was passing keyword args incorrectly).
  6. Duplicate Group Names: Fixed bug where creating multiple groups could produce duplicate names.
  7. is_group_header Boolean Conversion: Wrapped is_group_header result in bool() — Python's and operator returned a string, but Blender UI properties required a boolean.
  8. Tag Count Across Groups: get_tag_count() now correctly counts tags inside groups, not just ungrouped tags.
  9. Tag Lookup in Groups: get_tag_by_name() and get_tags_for_datatype() now search inside groups, ensuring grouped tags are visible to cascade resolution, render output rules, and variant filtering.
  10. Tag Group Migration: _init_tag_library_on_load now migrates tags with group_name from the flat cat.tags list into their proper group.tags collection on file load.
  11. Scoped Keyboard Shortcuts: Ctrl+G / Alt+G grouping shortcuts now only fire when the tag tree is active (tks_active_list_context = TAGS), preventing conflicts with other panels.
  12. Rest State False Drift on Hidden Objects: Hidden objects/collections caused false drift warnings because Blender doesn't evaluate FCurves for invisible objects. Added obj.visible_get() check to skip hidden objects in drift detection — covers object hiding, collection hiding, and collection exclusion.
  13. Rest State Snapping Not Applied: Unkeyed properties that were keyed in the Rest Action were never snapped back to their frame-0 baseline when a cascade action was active. Root cause: _apply_action_to_watched() assigned the cascade action but never called apply_rest_values(). Only the no-action path did ref snapping. Added ref state snap step after action assignment in cascade.py.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Click-to-Preview Variant States: Clicking an inactive state's diamond icon in the variant tree now immediately applies that variant to the viewport. Active state shown as filled color circle (template_node_socket), inactive as dimmed KEYFRAME diamond — matching the active VL indicator pattern.
  2. Simplified Material Item Creation: Assigning a material to the last empty pool slot auto-creates a new empty slot. Manual "Add Pool Material" button removed from smart-add (Ctrl+N) and add menu.
  3. Default Material Slot for New Parts: Every new Part (including default "base" part on product creation) starts with one empty pool material slot, ready for assignment.
  4. Native Material Selector: Replaced custom material popover with Blender's native template_ID for material selection, including New, Duplicate, and Unlink buttons.
  5. Object Count on Parts: Part rows now show the number of objects in the assigned collection alongside the pool material count.
  6. Missing Preset Detection & Warning (preset_health.py): New health check module scans all cascade tiers (config, Scene, Global, VL, VLG, SG, Rules) for preset references pointing to non-existent JSON files. Navigation bar shows UNLINKED icon when stale references exist.
  7. Missing Preset Warning Panel: Expandable subpanel in navigation bar lists all missing presets grouped by type, with collapsible type boxes matching the preset change warning style. Each entry shows group type + icon, group name box, arrow, stale preset name box, and per-row Clear/Replace buttons.
  8. Clear Missing Preset Operators: TKS_OT_ClearMissingPreset clears all stale references matching a specific preset name/type. TKS_OT_ClearAllMissingPresets wipes every stale reference. Both trigger cascade sync so child tiers re-inherit correct values.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Pool Index Clamping: Pool index spinner now only allows values pointing to slots with an assigned material (empty trailing slots excluded).
  2. Removed Apply Button: The large "Apply" button at bottom of variant panel is removed — applying now happens automatically when clicking a state.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Multiselect Checkbox Persistence: sync_variant_tree() was called on every panel draw and wiped tks_selected back to False. Now preserves selection state across rebuilds using a select_map capture/restore pattern.
  2. Material Unlink Cleanup: Unlinking a material from a pool slot now removes the empty row and shifts all variant pool indices down, preventing stale references.
  3. Empty Slot Delete Guard: Empty pool material slots (no material assigned) can no longer be deleted via DEL/X. Only assigned slots are removable, with proper index shifting.
  4. Cascade Product Add Return: Fixed RuntimeError in TKS_OT_VSW_AddCascadeProduct.execute — missing return {'FINISHED'} caused the function to return None instead of a set.
  5. Index Box Decoupling: Added separator before index boxes to visually decouple them from adjacent elements.
  6. Render Preset UI Crash: Removed setattr() calls that wrote to Scene properties during draw() — Blender 5.1 forbids writes to ID classes in draw context, which caused the Render and Color Management Preset UIs to disappear entirely.
  7. Batch Render Missing World Light: Added World cascade resolution to _phase_4_data in the batch render operator. The World cascade was the only cascade property not resolved during batch render, causing all VLs to render with the same world regardless of per-VL overrides.
  8. Viewport Samples Dirty Detection: Removed cycles.preview_samples from _VOLATILE_PROPS — viewport sample changes now correctly trigger the preset dirty warning.
  9. Time Limit Dirty Detection: Removed cycles.time_limit from _VOLATILE_PROPS — render time limit changes now correctly trigger the preset dirty warning. Only cycles.seed remains volatile.
  10. Preset Property Capture Coverage: Fixed _capture_properties_from_struct() using substring matching for exclusions — 'type' in the exclude list was silently dropping 7 Cycles *_type properties (bake_type, pixel_filter_type, rolling_shutter_type, etc.) and 'use' was dropping ALL use_pass_* viewlayer properties (57 props). Switched to exact-match so only literal rna_type, bl_rna, name, type identifiers are excluded.
  11. Batch Render Context Bug: Fixed "Python context internal state bug" during batch rendering. Phase 4 preset-config update callbacks accessed stale context.scene pointers after the Phase 1 scene switch. Wrapped Phase 4 data overrides in context.temp_override() to guarantee consistent context.
  12. Batch Render Window Crash: Fixed native EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION crash in wm_draw_update_test_window during batch rendering. INVOKE_DEFAULT render call created a render window during a modal timer callback after scene switching, corrupting Blender's window draw state. Switched to EXEC_DEFAULT with render_display_type = 'NONE' for headless batch rendering.
  13. Extension Compatibility (ADDON_MODULE): Replaced 53 hardcoded addons.get("takes_for_blender") references across 25 files with a dynamic ADDON_MODULE constant in core_minimal/constants.py. Addon preferences now resolve correctly for both extension (bl_ext.user_default.takes_for_blender) and legacy installs.
  14. Preset Discovery Path: Fixed _get_addon_presets_dir() in storage.py to correctly resolve built-in presets at features/presets/. Fixed _get_user_presets_dir() to include the /presets subdirectory where user-created presets are actually stored — 13 user presets were previously invisible.
  15. BOM Stripping: Removed UTF-8 BOM (byte order mark) from 21 Python files that prevented module import in Python 3.12+ (Blender 5.1), silently disabling all panel registrations.
  16. Fileoutput Preset Import: Fixed draw_output_panel_prepend() in batch_render/panel.py — was importing properties instead of preset_engine for is_preset_dirty, causing silent AttributeError that hid the fileoutput preset row.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Inline Rename for Actions & Slots: Double-click action or slot names directly in the Inspector UIList to rename them. Edits are applied immediately via per-item _prev_name tracking, replacing the previous broken global stash approach.
  2. Auto-Rename Conflict Guard: When auto-rename-by-hierarchy is enabled, manual rename attempts are blocked and the user is notified via a TKS_OT_ShowRenameWarning popup. A toggle button (FONT_DATA icon) on the Actions list header controls the auto_rename_actions preference directly from the UI.
  3. Copy VL Collections Operator (TKS_OT_CopyVLCollections): New operator to copy all linked collections and objects from one view layer and paste them to another view layer in another scene.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Popover Field Alignment (Camera & World): Rule tag and preset fields in cascade popovers no longer shift horizontally when a rule is assigned or cleared. Root cause: revert buttons were appended to rule_row (parent of the split) instead of inside the split's right-side container. Refactored all 11 rule rows across ops_camera.py (5) and ops_world.py (6) to match the preset_selector_row layout pattern — both prop_search and revert/spacer are now children of right = split.row(align=True).
  2. Action Duplication on Rename: Actions no longer duplicate when renamed via the Inspector UIList. The previous global _rename_stash dictionary was shared across all items, causing stale name lookups. Replaced with per-item _prev_name StringProperty on both TKS_InspectorActionItem and TKS_InspectorSlotItem.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text: 1. Tree Flash on Rename: Renaming scenes, view layers, or groups no longer causes the takes tree UIList to flash. Name-only changes now use in-place name patching instead of triggering a full collection rebuild. Removed redundant draw-time name-change detection that caused a second sync on every rename.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Sub-Data Action Assignment: Materials and node trees no longer receive the cascade action unless they have a matching slot with keyframes. Previously, the cascade assigned the action to every animatable sub-target, polluting Scene, World, and all materials with unwanted animation_data. Sub-targets with stale assignments are now auto-cleaned on VL switch.
  2. Fresh Action Merge Crash: Fixed bpy_prop_collection.get() crash in _process_fresh_actions timer callback ("returned a result with an exception set"). Replaced all .get() calls with Python iteration to bypass the Blender C-API bug.
  3. Fresh Action Merge Type Mismatch: resolve_cascade() returns an Action object but the merge code compared it as a string name — target_action was always None. Now uses the object directly.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Tree Line Width Setting: New 3-step width selector (Thin / Medium / Wide) for tree indent color strips in visibility options. Only active when "Show Tag Color" is enabled. Helps keep tag colors visible when the UI is zoomed out.
  2. Navigation Bar Split: Reorganised the panel header into two rows. Row 1: Lock, Autokey, Timeline Sync (left) | Warnings, Globals, Help, Settings (right). Row 2: Context + Link + Inspector tabs (full width).

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text: 1. Camera Preset Guard — Cascade Resolution: The camera preset UI guard now checks against the cascade-resolved camera instead of scene.camera. Prevents the guard from being bypassed when clicking a different camera in the Outliner (which changes scene.camera). The "Select" button also resolves via cascade.

docs.title: Added
docs.text: 1. Camera Guard for Output Rules: Output Rules and their preset chains are only applied when a camera resolves from the 6-tier cascade. VLs without a camera assignment silently skip rule/preset application — previously assigned rules remain stored but inactive.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text: 1. Best Practices Audit Fixes: Fixed 5 double-quoted enum returns in creation.py to use single quotes per Blender convention. Removed 2 stale commented-out print() calls in vl_persistence.py.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text: 1. Rest State VL Switch Performance: Gated all hot-path debug logging in _handle_autokey_mirror and apply_rest_values behind tks_log_active() pre-check. When REST subtopic is disabled (default), zero string formatting or file I/O occurs — eliminating ~486 log writes per VL switch.

docs.title: Added
docs.text: 1. tks_log_active() Fast Pre-Check: New function in utils/logger.py that returns True/False without any string formatting or file I/O. Use in hot paths to conditionally skip expensive tks_log() calls.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Auto-Mirror Keyframes Toggle (tks_auto_mirror_ref): New Boolean toggle on WindowManager to disable automatic Rest State creation when keyframes are added. Available in both the Rest State popover and the Globals panel Settings section. Defaults to ON (preserving existing behavior).
  2. Global Autokey Toggle (tks.toggle_autokey): Autokey button in the navigation bar now toggles use_keyframe_insert_auto on ALL scenes simultaneously, ensuring consistent autokey state across every scene and view layer.
  3. Set Rest Default Operator (tks.set_rest_default): New operator to keyframe the current property value directly into the Rest State action at frame 0 without switching ViewLayers. Auto-creates rest action and target slot if neither exists. Three UX entry points: right-click property menu ("Set as Rest Default"), keyboard shortcut (Shift+Alt+I), and programmatic invocation with explicit data_path/array_index.
  4. Autokey Mirror Handler: When Blender's native autokeying is active, any keyframe inserted into the current cascade action is automatically mirrored to the Rest State action at frame 0 with CONSTANT interpolation. Includes recursion guard, batch-render safety, and lazy slot creation. Ensures rest defaults stay in sync as the user works.
  5. Watchlist Cascade Gating: Auto-detected (non-manual) objects are now hidden from the Inspector watchlist when no cascade action is set. Only manually-added objects and objects with a per-object override (tks_action) appear when no cascade action is assigned.
  6. Deep Digging Hierarchical Debug System: Replaced generic print() statements with a robust, topic-based logging engine (utils/logger.py). Features daily log rotation (takes_for_blender_YYYY-MM-DD.log), auto-cleanup of logs older than 7 days, and a fully customizable folder/filename path.
  7. Granular Log Filtering: Added 6 primary topics (CORE, UI, DATA, OPS, FEATURES, RENDER) and 25+ specific subtopics (e.g., INIT, INSPECTOR, MIGRATE, VSW) to the Addon Preferences. Allows developers to isolate log output to precisely the systems they are currently troubleshooting.
  8. Automated Preference Persistence: Completely removed the hardcoded _SAVEABLE_PREFS array and defaults dictionary. The addon now natively uses Blender's RNA reflection (bl_rna.properties) to dynamically detect, serialize to JSON, load, and reset every single custom property defined on the TKS_AddonPreferences class.
  9. Data Migration Framework: Registry-based migration system in migration.py with load_post auto-detection, per-file dismiss tracking, and a "Data Migration" section in addon preferences. Includes heuristic cascade bootstrap migration (v0_3_cascade_bootstrap) that populates empty tks_camera/tks_world/tks_compositor strings from Blender's native scene state on file load.
  10. Blender Bugs Documentation: New doc/blender_bugs/ folder documenting known Blender-internal bugs (Cycles tag_redraw, GPU double-free, TBB mesh crash) separate from addon troubleshooting.
  11. Variant Switch Three-Mode System: Added three variant modes — Swap (direct material replacement), Preset (apply material preset in-place via JSON), and Pool (pick from a product-level material palette). Mode selector appears as segmented row in variant detail. New PropertyGroups: TKS_VSW_PresetRule, TKS_VSW_PoolMaterial, TKS_VSW_PoolChannel, TKS_VSW_PoolSelection. New CRUD operators for all modes. Fully backwards-compatible (defaults to Swap mode).
  12. Cascade Rename Popup: Replaced inline name fields with a pencil icon (✏️) button that opens a rename dialog via invoke_props_dialog. Immediately updates all cascade strings after renaming.
  13. Mutually Exclusive +/✏️ Buttons: In all 8 VL + Scene cascade popovers, the + (New) button shows only when empty; the ✏️ (Rename) button shows only when assigned. Cleaner, less cluttered UI.
  14. World New Operators: Added TKS_OT_VLWorldNew and TKS_OT_SceneWorldNew to create new World data-blocks directly from the World popover (previously missing).
  15. Camera-Only Selector Filtering: Camera prop_search dropdowns now show only CAMERA-type objects linked into the current scene, instead of all objects across the entire file. Uses a dynamic TKS_CameraItem collection on WindowManager populated at draw time.
  16. Unlinked Camera Warning: Camera popovers now show an info label when the assigned camera name exists in the file but is not linked into the current scene.

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text:
1. Rest State Snap Respects Keyed Slots: apply_rest_values now checks the target's own animation_data.action (all slots) for keyed paths, not just the caller-passed target_action (which was often None). Properties keyed on ANY slot are now protected from ref state snapping.
  2. Autokey-Off Guard for Mirror Handler: _handle_autokey_mirror now checks scene.tool_settings.use_keyframe_insert_auto and exits immediately when Blender autokey is OFF. Prevents false-positive rest action creation during VL switches.
  3. Depsgraph Crash Guard: Added object validity checks (bpy.data.objects.get() + ReferenceError catch) to _handle_autokey_mirror to prevent EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION in deg_iterator_objects_step after mass object deletion.
  4. Duplicate Popover Class Fix: Added missing auto-mirror toggle to the TKS_OT_RestActionPopover in _popovers_global.py which was overriding the one in context_popovers_ref.py.
  5. Autokey/Manual Keying Initial State Drop: Fixed bug where pressing I or using Autokey wouldn't capture the initial state to the Rest State Action. The _handle_autokey_mirror handler previously silently aborted if the shared Rest Action hadn't been manually created yet. It now auto-creates the action via ensure_rest_action if missing, completely restoring the native keyframe feel.
  6. Depsgraph Hard-Crash: Fixed EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION in deg_create_eval_copy caused by bulk-writing RNA properties via the Migration system. v0_3_cascade_bootstrap inadvertently fired cascade resolver updates for background scenes, resulting in an undo-pushed dependency graph avalanche. An _is_migrating lock now disables cascade evaluation during data migrations.
  7. Cascade Resolved-State Cache: Implemented _cascade_cache pattern in core_minimal/cascade.py to block redundant dependency graph updates on ViewLayer switches, vastly improving UI performance.
  8. Targeted Cascade Updates: Added prop_filter to apply_overrides() so Context panel UI tweaks natively isolate their updates to a single property without resolving the entire 6-level cascade.
  9. Autowatch Dependency Scanning: Rewrote the Autowatch scanner in panels/inspector.py to digest depsgraph.updates directly, precisely capturing newly keyframed objects instead of blindly polling the entire Blender dataset.
  10. ViewLayer-Filtered Auto Mode: Restricted the Inspector's 'Auto' mode list generation to iterate over vl.objects.values() strictly inside the active ViewLayer, removing heavy global scene iteration.
  11. Dirty Stash & Restore: Unsaved preset modifications are preserved across VL switches via a runtime stash. Returning to a VL restores the user's tweaks instead of re-applying from JSON.
  12. Volatile Property Exclusion: cycles.preview_samples and cycles.seed excluded from dirty comparison to prevent false positives caused by Cycles' runtime counters.
  13. Token-Aware Dirty Skip: Preset values containing Smart Output tokens (e.g., [view_layer]) are excluded from dirty comparison.
  14. Tag Rename Propagation: Renaming tags in the library propagates across all 11 reference locations (Scenes, VLs, Groups, Versions, Variants).
  15. Reactive Batch Render Engine: Refactored the batch render modal into a 5-phase reactive state machine. Uses a depsgraph_update_post settlement observer to ensure context stability before rendering, eliminating ED_region_do_listen null-pointer crashes. Added 0.5s safety timeout and accelerated modal timer to 0.05s.
  16. Persistent Autowatch Enforcement: Moved Autowatch action assignment logic from the UI draw() call to a persistent depsgraph_update_post handler. This ensures objects keyframed while the Inspector panel is hidden or collapsed correctly receive the assigned cascade action.
  17. Implemented automatic action creation using naming tokens when keyframing objects without an assigned Take action.
  18. Standardized all action and slot creation to strictly follow predefined naming tokens from addon preferences.
  19. Variant Switch Re-entrant Depsgraph Crash: Added _applying_cascade re-entrancy guard to _apply_variant_cascade and the depsgraph_update_post handler. Prevents recursive view_layer.update() calls that caused EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION in MEM_lockfree_freeN when rapidly switching variants.
  20. Variant Switch UI Block Corruption Crash: Switched cascade apply to always use _apply_variant_direct instead of bpy.ops.tks.vsw_apply_variant. The REGISTER+UNDO operator path corrupted UI blocks during ED_region_do_draw, causing EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION in UI_block_free.
  21. Scene Switch GPU Buffer Double-Free Crash: Removed context.view_layer.update() calls from cascade.py (apply_overrides and _apply_action_to_watched). These forced synchronous depsgraph rebuilds that crashed with GPU_vertbuf_discard when called after window.scene assignment, as TBB threads were still tearing down mesh eval copies. Replaced with safe scene.update_tag() deferred pattern.
  22. UIList Collection Mutation Block Crash: Added _force_panel_redraw() after sync_all_viewlayers clears and rebuilds the tks_all_viewlayers collection. The collection.clear() freed RNA data that existing UI blocks still referenced, causing UI_block_free crash in MEM_lockfree_freeN on next draw. Forcing a full area redraw ensures stale blocks are discarded in the correct lifecycle order.
  23. UI-Triggered Synchronous Scene Switch (TBB Mesh Crash): Deferred all context.window.scene = scene assignments triggered from UI callbacks/operators (TKS_OT_SwitchViewLayer, TKS_OT_SwitchScene, _on_scenes_index_changed) to 0.01s app timers. Synchronous scene switching from ui_apply_but_funcs_after loops triggered concurrent TBB mesh buffer disposal (GPU_vertbuf_discard) while OpenGL redraw context was still entangled, causing fatal access violations. Refactored temporary scene-hops natively to context.temp_override.
  24. Variant Switch Direct Map: Replaced the two-step reverse+forward material resolution in _apply_variant_direct with a pure source→target swap. No middleman, no base resolution.
  25. PointerProperty Migration Stabilization (8 files, 30+ fixes): Cascade properties at VL/Scene level migrated from StringProperty to PointerProperty. Fixed all downstream code: UI widgets switched from prop_search() to layout.prop(), resolve_cascade result handling updated across inspector, heartbeat, and cascade enforcement, restore_base/get_base_camera/get_base_compositor now handle datablocks directly, rename utility skips PointerProperty levels (native rename tracking), heal function skips non-string values, migration bootstrap assigns datablocks with None defaults.
  26. Heartbeat Cascade Action Application: Fixed _watchlist_heartbeat in vl_persistence.py where bpy.data.actions.get(pointer_value) silently returned None because resolve_cascade now returns datablocks from PointerProperty. The heartbeat's 3 staggered beats after VL switch now correctly apply the cascade action.
  27. Inspector Deferred Action Assignment: Fixed TypeError where string values were being assigned to PointerProperty fields (vl.tks_action, scene.tks_action). Now assigns Action datablocks for VL/Scene PointerProperty and string for VLVersion StringProperty.
  28. Stale Cascade Healing: Fixed TypeError in _heal_stale_cascade_strings where PointerProperty datablocks were passed to val in collection (expects string). Added isinstance(val, str) guard — PointerProperty values track renames natively.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Cascade Overflow Popover: Dynamic collapse system — cascade icons overflow into a ⋯ button when the panel is narrow.
  2. Collapse Mode: DYNAMIC (auto by width) / ALWAYS (permanently collapsed) toggle in visibility settings.
  3. Adjustable Collapse Width: IntProperty slider (600–800 px) to fine-tune the collapse threshold.
  4. Rest State Visibility Toggle: Ghost icon (tks_show_rest_state) added to the icon visibility row.
  5. Rename Propagation: Inline scene/VL renames now propagate to VL group members and version sets via name fingerprinting in the depsgraph handler.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Cascade icon order: Rest Ghost → Tag → Variant → Action → Comp → World → Camera → Output Tag → Render.
  2. Icon visibility toggle row reordered to match new cascade order.
  3. Full collapse: Tag, Variant, and Rest Ghost now collapse into the overflow popover (previously only Action/Comp/World/Camera/Output).
  4. Overflow popover draw updated to include Tag, Variant, and Rest Ghost rows for all 6 scope types.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. All Takes Tree: Unified hierarchical UIList (TKS_UL_AllViewLayers) with Scene Groups, Scenes, VL Groups, ViewLayers, and VL Versions.
  2. Global Cascade Row: Permanent top-row inside the UIList for global overrides, sharing scrollbar space.
  3. Scene/VL Groups: Drag-reorderable groups with expand/collapse, tag assignment, and cascade icons.
  4. VL Versions: Named override snapshots per ViewLayer with cascade property storage.
  5. Cascade Icons: Per-row Action, Compositor, World, Camera, Output Tag, Variant, Tag, and Rest Ghost icons.
  6. Tree Lines: Configurable indent lines with color picker in visibility settings.
  7. Icon Visibility Settings: Popover with per-icon toggles, tree options, and tag color toggle.
  8. Depsgraph Sync: Auto-resync on scene/VL add/delete via deferred timer.
  9. Batch Render: Modal render queue with progress tracking and Smart Output token engine.
  10. Variant Switch: Product variant system with per-scope cascade overrides.
  11. Rest State: Ghost-based rest action comparison system.

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
1. Context Panel refactored from dual-list (Scenes + VLs) to unified tree view.
  2. Integrated global row into UIList (removed standalone _draw_global_row).

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. Initial project structure (panels/, operators/, properties/, utils/).
  2. Addon Preferences: Feature toggles, active tab navigation, panel visibility settings.
  3. Architecture Roadmap: Comprehensive plan including Phase 1-4 and Advanced Features.
  4. UI Shell System (Phase 3): N-Panel navigation, Context/Globals/Manage/Audit/Properties panels.
  5. Manage Panel: Action/Slot CRUD operators, column visibility menus.
  6. Documentation (Wiki): User Guide indexes and panel guides.
  7. Author Identity: Mandatory authorship of "Nikolaj Woroschilow" enforced.
  8. Skeleton files for Phase 1.

docs.title: Changelog (Developer / Technical)
docs.text:
Full technical detail for each release. Companion to CHANGELOG.md — same section structure, same entry numbering, same bold lead per entry, but the body keeps class names, file paths, audit IDs, error fingerprints, and failed-approaches notes that get trimmed from the user-facing log.

Lift from commit-message bodies on each release; this file is a curated rollup, not new authoring.

Legend: 🟢 confirmed working in-app  ·  🔴 added but not yet verified in-app

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
1. 🟢 Automatic View-Layer Preload can open the progress panel for you. New pref preload_auto_open_panel (BoolProperty, default False) in TKS_AutomationsPropsMixin (preferences/props/props_automations.py); EXPECTED_PROP_COUNT 495→496. Drawn in preferences/draw_workflow.py as an indented sub-flag, shown only when preload_viewlayers_mode == 'AUTO'. Hook in core/vl_lifecycle.py (_deferred_load_apply, the AUTO start_preload() site): after start_preload(), if the pref is set AND is_preloading() (a preload actually started — start_preload no-ops when all layers are preloaded), set wm.tks_show_preload_panel = True. Mutual exclusivity (below) closes any other open warning panel.

  2. 🟢 The public wiki now mirrors the changelog, alongside the roadmap. The wiki CI (Takes-for-Blender-Wiki/.github/workflows/deploy-docs.yml) gained a "Mirror changelogs from addon source" step that copies the cloned .addon-src/CHANGELOG.md → docs/changelog/index.md and CHANGELOG_DEV.md → docs/changelog/dev.md. Published 1:1, markers + legend intact — the wiki is the documented exception to the strip-markers rule, which still governs the shipped ZIP changelog + release-notes (see memory feedback-release-logs-no-verification-markers). Surfaced via a new What's New nav group in mkdocs.yml (Changelog · Changelog (Dev) · Roadmap), replacing the lone top-level Roadmap tab. Two follow-up fixes were needed to make mkdocs build --strict (fails on any unresolved link) pass on the mirrored dev page: (a) the copy step sed-rewrites the intro's sibling changelog link to the user page (index.md, same dir) and de-links any source-file (.py) reference to inline code; (b) dev/build/verify_wiki.py now skips any docs/changelog/ path in its string-drift scan, since a changelog names historical / renamed / removed identifiers by design. Same mirror pattern as the roadmap board: pure wiki-side adaptation, a push to the addon repo republishes both. 🟢 verified live — Changelog, Changelog (Dev), and Roadmap render under the What's New landing page, with correct breadcrumbs and version-only nav confirmed on the deployed wiki.

  3. 🟢 A token/value toggle in the Build Syntax popover switches the grid between token names and their live values. New WindowManager.tks_token_show_values (BoolProperty, SKIP_SAVE), toggle drawn left of the search box in token_builder.draw_builder_strip (icon flips SYNTAX_ON ↔ HIDE_OFF). panel._draw_builder_columns resolves token_example once per cell (reused for the existing dim cue) and, when the toggle is on, passes it as a display label override to _emit_token — falling back to the token name when a token has no value. The appended token is unchanged: clicking still inserts {token}, not the resolved value. Separators / path literals are excluded (they already show their value beside them). Test test_token_toggle_icons_are_valid (icon-enum validity). Commit b47373b.

  4. 🟢 Quick-insert tokens + Clear Last / Clear All in every token field's ▾ popover. Each field's ▾ popover (the naming-template rows and the Smart Output Directory / File Name rows) gained an "Insert Token" list of its top essential tokens — one click appends the bracketed token at the very end of the field — plus "Clear Last Token" (drops the last whole token via the shared parse_segments/remove_segment, never a single character) and "Clear All" (empties the field). The list is the field's valid tokens only, so a click can never produce an invalid-token status: naming rows rank essential_tokens_for_field(field) (preferences/naming.py, intersected with TOKENS_PER_TEMPLATE, date/time excluded, cap 5); output rows rank essential_tokens_for_filter('CONTEXT','RENDER_PATH') against the new shared ESSENTIAL_TOKEN_PRIORITY (features/smart_syntax/builder.py). Wired through one pair of target-aware operators in builder.py — tks.field_append_token (reads target, appends format_token_for(mode, token)) and tks.field_clear (action CLEAR_LAST / CLEAR_ALL) — both keyed by the same (target_kind, target_data, bracket_mode) param set the Build Syntax launcher already uses, so prefs/CURLY (naming) and scene/SMART (output) share the code; this replaced two short-lived naming-only operators (tks.append_naming_token / tks.edit_naming_field) authored earlier the same session, avoiding duplicate operators. _draw_field_actions (naming) and the new _draw_quickpick_and_clear helper (features/batch_render/panel.py) draw the rows; Reset to Default was regrouped to sit just above the two clear rows so all "undo my edits" actions are together. Tests: test_output_popover_quickpick.py (new, Dir/File popover wiring), essential_tokens_for_filter cases in test_token_builder.py, the quick-pick/clear cases in test_naming_validation.py, and updated sequence/divider expectations in test_row_action_menu.py. Full suite 634 passed, 1 skipped. Lives in the new features/smart_syntax/ package (see Changed entry 7). ✅ in-app verified.

  5. 🟢 A search bar above the Preferences tabs dims non-matching settings (Naming tab pilot). Blender's native settings search is C-level and never reaches an AddonPreferences.draw() body — there is no API to read the native filter text and it won't dim custom rows — so the dim-non-matches / keep-matches-highlighted behaviour is reimplemented in Python. New prefs_search StringProperty on TKS_MiscPropsMixin (preferences/props/props_misc.py) with options={'TEXTEDIT_UPDATE','SKIP_SAVE'} and no update= callback (live redraw per keystroke; typing never triggers autosave); added to persistence_io.UI_STATE_KEYS so the JSON persistence never serializes it; EXPECTED_PROP_COUNT 481→482. Drawn above the tab-nav row in preferences/addon_prefs.py (prop(self,"prefs_search",icon='VIEWZOOM') + a conditional ✕ that runs the new tks.clear_pref_search INTERNAL op in preferences/ops_misc.py). Two pure decision functions (unit-tested in isolation): pref_matches(query, *texts) in preferences/addon_prefs_helpers.py (case-insensitive substring; empty query → True; None-safe) and naming_search_flags(query, title, fields, label_fn=naming_field_label) in preferences/draw_naming.py (returns (section_match, {field: active}); a title hit lights the whole section; empty query is neutral so manual expand state is respected). Wiring: draw_naming_template_row gained active=True (sets row.active), draw_collapsible_section gained force_expand=False/active=True (search reveals a matching section without disturbing the stored expand flag and dims a no-match header), _draw_naming_categories/draw_naming_tab thread the query from prefs.prefs_search. Scope: Naming tab only (the data-driven NAMING_TEMPLATE_CATEGORIES pilot); the bar is global but other tabs are inline draws that opt in later (roadmap phase 4), and cross-tab auto-jump is deliberately out of scope. Tests: dev/tests/test_prefs_search.py (9, all pure); adjacent persistence/naming/panel/UI/accordion groups 116 passed. Roadmap doc/roadmap/active/prefs-search.md. ✅ in-app verified.

  6. 🟢 A "Show Tip Boxes" switch hides the add-on's explanatory tip boxes addon-wide. New show_tip_boxes BoolProperty (default True, update=_autosave_preferences) on TKS_MiscPropsMixin (preferences/props/props_misc.py); EXPECTED_PROP_COUNT 480→481. Persists like any pref — in none of the persistence_io exclude sets. Surfaced in the "Info Boxes" accordion under Preferences → Interface → Confirmations (draw_interface.py; expand flag expand_confirm_infoboxes in props_logging.py → +1 to EXPECTED_PROP_COUNT, see entry 8; added to the Interface>Confirmations ACCORDION_GROUPS tuple and the prefs_search.SEARCH_INDEX['UI']['CONFIRMATIONS'] section list). (Earlier draft lived under a dedicated Interface→Misc subtab; that subtab was removed and the toggles relocated into Confirmations.) Gating lives in the shared component: ui/styles.py::tip_boxes_enabled() does a defensive bpy.context.preferences.addons[ADDON_MODULE].preferences read needing only ADDON_MODULE, so ui.styles stays free of any preferences-package import (no circular dependency) and returns True when prefs are unreachable. wrapped_info_box(..., kind='tip') returns None and draws nothing when off. Tests: dev/tests/test_info_box.py. ✅ in-app verified.

  7. 🟢 A "Show Warning Details" switch hides the read-once explanation inside warning panels. New show_warning_details BoolProperty (default True, update=_autosave_preferences) on TKS_MiscPropsMixin; EXPECTED_PROP_COUNT 482→483 (after prefs_search's 481→482). The component's old is_tip boolean became a kind string — 'tip' (gated by tip_boxes_enabled), 'warning' (gated by the new warning_details_enabled(), parallel defensive read), 'status' / 'info' (never gated). The N-panel naming-template consequence note (panels/navigation/warnings/naming_changes.py) moved to kind='warning' + the centralized INFOBOX_NAMING_TOKENS_WARNING (texts/infoboxes.py), so it hides while the warning headline + Fix buttons (drawn separately) stay. Drawn in the same Info Boxes accordion next to Show Tip Boxes.

  8. 🟢 An ✕ on each tip / warning box hides that whole category, after a confirmation; and every box now carries a mandatory header. Header row in wrapped_info_box (ui/styles.py) gained a ✕ for kind in ('tip','warning') → tks.dismiss_info_boxes (preferences/ops_misc.py, INTERNAL, kind StringProperty). Its invoke() uses the plain wm.invoke_confirm(self, event) so the popup appears at the mouse pointer like the add-on's other confirmations (the rich title=/message= variant renders a centered dialog); execute() flips show_tip_boxes / show_warning_details off (the prop update= autosaves) + signal_redraw(). status/info boxes draw no ✕ (no pref to gate to). No new property. Separately, every box now has a header (no headerless path): default word per kind (_DEFAULT_HEADERS = Tip/Warning/Status/Info), title= overrides, title="" falls back to the default. The Info Boxes accordion's expand_confirm_infoboxes flag (props_logging.py, default True) accounts for EXPECTED_PROP_COUNT 483→484. Tests: dev/tests/test_info_box.py (15 — kind gating × mandatory header × dismiss-button-present-per-kind).

  9. 🔴 The Build Syntax sheet offers Blender's own filepath tokens on render-path fields. Blender 5.1 resolves its own filepath template tokens in render-output + File Output paths, so the token grid now includes all 13: {scene} {camera} {fps} {resolution_x} {resolution_y} {blend_name} {blend_dir} {blend_name_lib} {blend_dir_lib} {node_name} plus #### (frame) and // / ../ (path). New engine data BLENDER_NATIVE_TOKENS + blender_native_by_category; WM toggle tks_token_show_blender_defaults (default True). Natives scatter into their matching categories, each trailed by the Blender logo (a native {scene} 🔵 sits beside its add-on twin [scene]), inserted LITERALLY in Blender's {…}/####/// syntax, never the add-on bracket style. Shown only on the render-path surface (not naming templates). Bracket-sync now reserves curly {…} — convert_to_current_style never rewrites a {token}, so inserting a native on a SQUARE-style field no longer triggers the red Sync-Brackets correction. {blend_name_lib}/{blend_dir_lib} became real registry tokens (resolve like blend_name/blend_dir, no linked-library context in a render path), leaving BLENDER_NATIVE_TOKENS = just the three frame/path literals. Category sort counts only add-on/separator cells, so toggling natives changes a category's height but never its position; the marker trails the token and the dimmed per-native explanation label was dropped (duplicated the hover tooltip). Commits 8d56686, 6b0e11e, 8af3790, be56a7a, a5b1846, a99885b, 5df302e.

  10. 🔴 Every token-capable field has its own Build Syntax button, seeded from that field. No token sheet opens without a field context. The context-seeded launcher (_build_pattern_button) now sits on naming-template prefs rows (draw_field_row: TEMPLATE filter, prefs target, CURLY brackets — shows only that field's valid tokens) and on File Output node fields (TKS_PT_SmartOutput: Directory, File Name, each output slot path) via a new 'node' target kind (_resolve_output_node + _node_slot_index, read/write across the scene's compositor trees; tks_token_target_node WM state).
